28218.title: How Well Insured are Job Losers? Efficacy of the Public Safety Net.
28218.zh_title: 失业者的保险程度如何？公共安全网的效能
28218.abstract: An extensive literature documents large and persistent declines in earnings following job loss. We study how the public safety net mitigates this using the 1996-2013 Survey of Income and Program Participation. Using an individual fixed effects model, we document which public programs provide the most insurance, and how this varies by pre-job loss characteristics. We find that Unemployment Insurance provides the largest buffer against lost income, but that the neediest are less well insured compared to middle- and higher- income job losers. This has important implications for the progressivity of the safety net, and how best to support displaced workers.
28218.zh_abstract: 大量文献记录了失业后收入大幅且持续的下降。我们利用1996-2013年收入与项目参与调查，研究公共安全网如何缓解这种情况。使用个体固定效应模型，我们记录了哪些公共项目提供了最大的保险，以及这如何因失业前的特征而异。我们发现，失业保险提供了对收入损失的最大缓冲，但与中高收入的失业者相比，最贫困者的保险程度较低。这对安全网的累进性以及如何最好地支持失业工人具有重要意义。

28217.title: Child-Driven Parenting: Differential Early Childhood Investment by Offspring Genotype
28217.zh_title: 儿童驱动的养育：后代基因型对早期儿童投资的差异化影响
28217.abstract: A growing literature points to children’s influence on parents’ behavior, including parental investments in children. Further, previous research has shown differential parental response by socioeconomic status to children's birth weight, cognitive ability, and school outcomes – all early life predictors of later socioeconomic success. This study considers an even earlier, more exogenous predictor of parental investments: offspring genotype. Specifically, we analyze (1) whether children’s genetic propensity towards educational success affects parenting during early childhood; and (2) whether parenting in response to children’s genetic propensity towards educational success is socially stratified. Using data from the Avon Longitudinal Survey of Parents and Children (N=7,738), we construct polygenic scores for educational attainment and regress cognitively stimulating parenting behavior during early childhood on these polygenic scores. We use a range of modeling strategies to address the concern that child’s genotype may be proxying unmeasured parent characteristics. Results show that parents provide more cognitive stimulation to children with higher education polygenic scores. This pattern varies by socioeconomic status with college-educated parents responding less to children’s genetic propensity towards educational success than non-college-educated parents do.
28217.zh_abstract: 越来越多的文献指出儿童对父母行为的影响，包括父母对子女的投资。此外，先前的研究表明，父母对子女出生体重、认知能力和学业成果（这些均为后期社会经济成功的早期生活预测指标）的反应因社会经济地位而异。本研究考虑了一个更早、更外生的父母投资预测因素：后代的基因型。具体而言，我们分析了（1）儿童对教育成功的遗传倾向是否会影响早期儿童期的养育行为；以及（2）父母对儿童教育成功遗传倾向的反应是否具有社会分层性。利用埃文亲子纵向研究数据（样本量N=7,738），我们构建了教育成就的多基因评分，并将早期儿童期的认知刺激性养育行为对这些多基因评分进行回归。我们采用一系列建模策略来解决儿童基因型可能代表未测量的父母特征这一担忧。结果显示，父母对具有更高教育多基因评分的儿童提供更多认知刺激。这种模式因社会经济地位而异，受过大学教育的父母对儿童教育成功遗传倾向的反应低于未受过大学教育的父母。
28217.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH；JEL：D13, I14, I24, J13

28216.title: The Gender Gap Among Top Business Executives
28216.zh_title: 高层企业高管中的性别差距
28216.authors: Wolfgang Keller, Teresa Molina, William W. Olney
28216.abstract: This paper examines gender differences among top US business executives using a large executive-employer matched data set spanning the last quarter century. Female executives make up 6% of the sample and exhibit more labor market churning — both higher entry and higher exit rates. Unconditionally, women earn 26% less than men, which decreases to 8% once executive characteristics, firm characteristics, and in particular job title are accounted for. We find that female executives are disproportionately represented in firms with more temporal flexibility and female-friendly corporate cultures, but this does not explain the gender pay gap. Rather, corporate culture is correlated with gender pay gaps within firms; specifically the within-firm gender pay gap is significantly smaller at female-friendly firms.
28216.zh_abstract: 本文利用过去四分之一个世纪的大型高管-雇主匹配数据集，考察了美国高层企业高管中的性别差异。女性高管占样本的6%，并且表现出更高的劳动力市场流动性——无论是进入率还是退出率都更高。无条件情况下，女性收入比男性低26%，在考虑高管特征、企业特征，特别是职位头衔后，这一差距缩小至8%。我们发现，女性高管不成比例地集中在具有更高时间灵活性和女性友好企业文化的公司中，但这并不能解释性别薪酬差距。相反，企业文化与企业内部的性别薪酬差距相关；具体而言，在女性友好的公司中，企业内部的性别薪酬差距显著更小。

28215.title: Economic Analysis and Infrastructure Investment
28215.zh_title: 经济分析与基础设施投资
28215.authors: Edward L. Glaeser, James M. Poterba
28215.abstract: This paper summarizes economic research on investment in public infrastructure and introduces the findings of several new studies on this topic. It begins with a review of several potential justifications for the public sector’s involvement in building, financing, and operating infrastructure, including limitations of private capital markets, externalities, and the control of natural monopolies. It then describes the conditions that characterize an optimal infrastructure investment program, emphasizing the need to extend project-based microeconomic cost-benefit analysis to incorporate the value of economy-wide macroeconomic and other externalities. It notes the importance of efficient use of infrastructure capital, and discusses three areas -- procurement, project management, and expenditure on externality mitigation – where further research could identify paths to efficiency improvement. It concludes by identifying several trends that have emerged since outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic that may have long-term effects on the role of both physical and digital infrastructure in the U.S. economy.
28215.zh_abstract: 本文总结了关于公共基础设施投资的经济研究，并介绍了该主题下几项新研究的发现。文章首先回顾了公共部门参与建设、融资和运营基础设施的若干潜在理由，包括私人资本市场的局限性、外部性以及自然垄断的控制。然后，它描述了最优基础设施投资计划的条件，强调需要将基于项目的微观经济成本效益分析扩展到涵盖整个经济范围的宏观经济及其他外部性的价值。文章指出了基础设施资本有效利用的重要性，并讨论了三个领域——采购、项目管理和外部性缓解支出——在这些领域，进一步的研究可以识别提高效率的途径。最后，文章总结了自COVID-19疫情爆发以来出现的几种趋势，这些趋势可能对实体和数字基础设施在美国经济中的作用产生长期影响。

28214.title: Selection and Causation in the Parental Education Gradient in Health: Lessons from a Large Sample of Adoptees
28214.zh_title: 父母教育梯度对健康影响中的选择与因果关系：来自大规模被收养者样本的启示
28214.authors: Evelina Björkegren, Mikael Lindahl, Mårten Palme, Emilia Simeonova
28214.abstract: We use data from a large sample of adoptees born in Sweden to study to what extent the well-established association between parental educational attainments and adult health of the child generation can be attributed to pre- or post-birth factors, respectively. We find a significant association between the educational attainment of the adopting parents and child health outcomes as adults. These results suggest that growing up in a better-educated household has long-term effects on health outcomes. Our analysis of the mechanisms behind the results suggests that formation of human capital, and in particular cognitive and non-cognitive skills, may be important.
28214.zh_abstract: 我们利用瑞典出生的大规模被收养者样本数据，研究父母教育成就与子女成年健康之间已确立的关联在多大程度上可归因于出生前或出生后的因素。我们发现，收养父母的教育成就与子女成年后的健康结果之间存在显著关联。这些结果表明，在受教育程度更高的家庭中成长对健康结果有长期影响。我们对结果背后机制的分析表明，人力资本的形成，特别是认知和非认知技能，可能至关重要。
28214.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS；JEL：I1, I12, I14, I26

28213.title: Monetary Policy and Redistribution in Open Economies
28213.zh_title: 开放经济体中的货币政策与再分配
28213.authors: Xing Guo, Pablo Ottonello, Diego J. Perez
28213.abstract: We study how monetary policy affects the asymmetric effects of globalization. To this end, we build an open-economy heterogeneous-agent New Keynesian model (HANK), in which households differ in their income, wealth, and real and financial integration with international markets. We use the model to reassess classic questions in international macroeconomics, but from a distributional perspective: What are the international spillovers of policies and shocks, how do alternative exchange-rate regimes compare, and what are the implications for monetary policy of the international price system. Our results indicate the presence of a trade-off between aggregate stabilization and inequality in consumption responses to external shocks. The asymmetric effects of globalization can be smaller for economies with higher international integration.
28213.zh_abstract: 我们研究货币政策如何影响全球化的非对称效应。为此，我们构建了一个开放经济体的异质性主体新凯恩斯模型（HANK），其中家庭在收入、财富以及与国际市场的实体和金融一体化程度方面存在差异。我们利用该模型从分配视角重新审视国际宏观经济学中的经典问题：政策和冲击的国际溢出效应如何，不同汇率制度如何比较，以及国际价格体系对货币政策有何影响。我们的结果表明，在应对外部冲击时，总体稳定与消费反应不平等之间存在权衡。对于国际一体化程度更高的经济体，全球化的非对称效应可能更小。
28213.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E21, E52, F3, F32, F41, F6

28212.title: Education and Consanguineous Marriage
28212.authors: Ş. Pelin Akyol, Naci H. Mocan
28212.abstract: At least one of every five marriages is consanguineous (between couples who are second cousins or closer) in the Middle East and North Africa, and the rate is higher than 50 percent in some parts of the world. Consanguineous marriage generates serious health problems for the offspring and constitutes an economic problem with its associated medical costs and the impact on human capital. The prevalence of consanguineous marriage and the resultant kinship networks can shape various dimensions of the society ranging from institutional structure to attitudes such as trust, individualism, and nepotism. Using data from Turkey and leveraging an education reform which increased mandatory schooling by three years, we find that the reform made women less likely to find consanguineous marriage as an acceptable practice, and that the reform reduced women’s propensity to marry a first cousin or a blood relative. Exposure to the reform altered women’s preferences in favor of personal autonomy. Women who are exposed to the reform are more likely to have met their husbands outside of family networks, they are less likely to get forced into marriage against their consent, and they are less likely to agree that only a son can ensure the continuation of the family blood line. These results indicate that educational attainment can alter behaviors and attitudes which may be rooted in culture.
28212.zh_abstract: 在中东和北非，至少五分之一的婚姻是近亲结婚（夫妻为二代堂表亲或更近的关系），而在世界某些地区，这一比例超过50%。近亲结婚会给后代带来严重的健康问题，并因其相关的医疗费用和对人力资本的影响而构成经济问题。近亲结婚的盛行以及由此产生的亲属网络可以塑造社会的各个方面，从制度结构到信任、个人主义和裙带关系等态度。利用土耳其的数据，并借助一项将义务教育年限增加三年的教育改革，我们发现该改革使女性更不容易认为近亲结婚是可接受的做法，并且降低了女性与表亲或血亲结婚的倾向。接触改革改变了女性的偏好，使其倾向于个人自主。接触改革的女性更有可能在家庭网络之外认识丈夫，更不可能被迫违背自己意愿结婚，也更不可能同意只有儿子才能确保家族血脉延续的观点。这些结果表明，教育成就能够改变可能根植于文化的行为和态度。
28212.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I15, I18, I20, J10, Z1

28211.title: Efficient Programs to Support Businesses During and After Lockdowns
28211.zh_title: 封锁期间及之后支持企业的高效计划
28211.abstract: I analyze efficient government interventions to mitigate financial distress during a severe macroeconomic downturn. At the macroeconomic level, the key variable is the gap between the real wage and the shadow cost of labor. This gap is large when unemployment is high. At the micro level, laissez-faire leads to excessive liquidation of businesses but an indiscriminate bailout prevents efficient reallocations and implies a large transfer from taxpayers to existing private creditors. I show that a cost-efficient intervention can be achieved with a continuation premium, whereby the government agrees to reduce its claims by the same haircut as private creditors plus a fixed premium.
28211.zh_abstract: 我分析了在严重宏观经济衰退期间缓解财务困境的高效政府干预措施。在宏观层面，关键变量是实际工资与劳动力影子成本之间的差距。当失业率高时，这一差距很大。在微观层面，自由放任会导致企业过度清算，但无差别的救助会阻止有效的资源重新配置，并意味着从纳税人向现有私人债权人进行大规模转移。我表明，通过持续溢价可以实现成本高效的干预，即政府同意以与私人债权人相同的减记比例加上固定溢价来减少其债权。
28211.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D24, G33, G38, H12

28210.title: Polluting Public Funds: The Effect of Environmental Regulation on Municipal Bonds.
28210.zh_title: 污染公共资金：环境监管对市政债券的影响
28210.authors: Akshaya Jha, Stephen A. Karolyi, Nicholas Z. Muller
28210.abstract: We present three findings on the effects of environmental regulation on the municipal bond market. First, yields increase (decrease) after a new standard is proposed (finalized), consistent with the resolution of regulatory uncertainty. Second, around annual compliance announcements, yields fall for counties that remain in compliance but increase for newly noncompliant counties. Third, yields are substantially higher for bonds from counties just above the pollution threshold relative to counties just below the threshold. Our findings suggest that increases in regulatory stringency or uncertainty over future environmental policy increase the cost of municipal debt raised to fund critical infrastructure.
28210.zh_abstract: 我们提出了关于环境监管对市政债券市场影响的三个发现。首先，在新标准提出（最终确定）后，收益率上升（下降），这与监管不确定性的消除相一致。其次，在年度合规公告前后，对于保持合规的县，收益率下降，但对于新不合规的县，收益率上升。第三，相对于刚好低于污染阈值的县，来自刚好高于污染阈值的县的债券收益率显著更高。我们的发现表明，监管严格程度的增加或未来环境政策的不确定性会提高为关键基础设施融资而筹集的市政债务成本。
28210.meta: Programs：AP, EEE, PE；JEL：G12, G14, Q52, Q53, Q58, R51

28209.title: Rules, Discretion, and Corruption in Procurement: Evidence from Italian Government Contracting
28209.zh_title: 采购中的规则、自由裁量权与腐败：来自意大利政府合同的证据
28209.authors: Francesco Decarolis, Raymond Fisman, Paolo Pinotti, Silvia Vannutelli
28209.abstract: The benefits of bureaucratic discretion depend on the extent to which it is used for public benefit versus exploited for private gain. We study the relationship between discretion and corruption in Italian government procurement auctions, using a confidential database of firms and procurement officials investigated for corruption by Italian enforcement authorities. We show that discretionary procedure auctions (those awarded based on negotiated rather than open bidding) are associated with corruption only when accompanied by limits to competition. We further show that, while these “corruptible” discretionary auctions are chosen more often by officials who are themselves investigated for corruption, they are used less often in procurement administrations in which at least one official is investigated for corruption. These findings fit with a framework in which more discretion leads to greater efficiency as well as more opportunities for theft, and a central monitor manages this trade-off by limiting discretion for high-corruption procedures and locales. Overall, our results suggest that competition may allow procurement authorities to extract the benefits of discretion while limiting the resultant risks of abuse.
28209.zh_abstract: 官僚自由裁量权的收益取决于其用于公共利益还是被滥用于私人利益。我们利用意大利执法机构调查的涉及腐败的企业和采购官员的机密数据库，研究了意大利政府采购拍卖中自由裁量权与腐败之间的关系。我们表明，只有在伴随竞争限制时，自由裁量程序拍卖（即基于谈判而非公开招标授予的拍卖）才与腐败相关。我们进一步表明，虽然这些“易腐败的”自由裁量拍卖更常被自身受到腐败调查的官员选择，但在至少有一名官员受到腐败调查的采购管理部门中，它们的使用频率较低。这些发现符合一个框架，即更多的自由裁量权既带来更高的效率，也带来更多的盗窃机会，而中央监督者通过限制高腐败程序和地区的自由裁量权来管理这种权衡。总体而言，我们的结果表明，竞争可能允许采购当局在限制由此产生的滥用风险的同时，获取自由裁量权的收益。
28209.meta: Programs：IO, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D72, D73, H57, K42

28208.title: The Value of Time in the United States: Estimates from Nationwide Natural Field Experiments
28208.zh_title: 美国的时间价值：来自全国性自然实地实验的估计
28208.authors: Ariel Goldszmidt, John A. List, Robert D. Metcalfe, Ian Muir, V. Kerry Smith, Jenny Wang
28208.abstract: The value of time determines relative prices of goods and services, investments, productivity, economic growth, and measurements of income inequality. Economists in the 1960s began to focus on the value of non-work time, pioneering a deep literature exploring the optimal allocation and value of time. By leveraging key features of these classic time allocation theories, we use a novel approach to estimate the value of time (VOT) via two large-scale natural field experiments with the ridesharing company Lyft. We use random variation in both wait times and prices to estimate a consumer's VOT with a data set of more than 14 million observations across consumers in U.S. cities. We find that the VOT is roughly $\$19$ per hour (or 75% (100%) of the after-tax mean (median) wage rate) and varies predictably with choice circumstances correlated with the opportunity cost of wait time. Our VOT estimate is larger than what is currently used by the U.S. Government, suggesting that society is under-valuing time improvements and subsequently under-investing public resources in time-saving infrastructure projects and technologies.
28208.zh_abstract: 时间价值决定了商品和服务的相对价格、投资、生产率、经济增长以及收入不平等的衡量。20世纪60年代的经济学家开始关注非工作时间的价值，开创了探索时间最优分配和价值的深厚文献。通过利用这些经典时间分配理论的关键特征，我们采用一种新颖的方法，通过与拼车公司Lyft进行的两个大规模自然实地实验来估计时间价值。我们利用等待时间和价格的随机变化，使用涵盖美国城市消费者超过1400万次观测的数据集来估计消费者的时间价值。我们发现时间价值约为每小时19美元（相当于税后平均工资率的75%或中位数工资率的100%），并且随着与等待时间机会成本相关的选择环境而可预测地变化。我们的时间价值估计高于美国政府目前使用的数值，这表明社会低估了时间改善的价值，并因此对节省时间的基础设施项目和技术投入了不足的公共资源。

28207.title: Financial Fragility during the COVID-19 Pandemic
28207.zh_title: COVID-19大流行期间的金融脆弱性
28207.authors: Robert L. Clark, Annamaria Lusardi, Olivia S. Mitchell
28207.abstract: Early in the COVID-19 pandemic, much of the US economy was closed to limit the virus’ spread, and several emergency interventions were implemented. Our analysis of older (45-75) respondents fielded in April-May of 2020 indicates that about one in five respondents was financially fragile and would have difficulty facing a mid-size emergency expense. Some subgroups were at particular risk of facing financial difficulties, especially younger respondents, those with larger families, Hispanics, and the low income. Moreover, the more financially literate were better able to handle such shocks, indicating that knowledge can provide some additional protection during a pandemic.
28207.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19大流行初期，美国大部分经济被关闭以限制病毒传播，并实施了几项紧急干预措施。我们对2020年4月至5月期间调查的45-75岁受访者的分析表明，大约五分之一的受访者存在金融脆弱性，难以应对中等规模的紧急支出。一些亚群体面临财务困难的风险尤其高，特别是较年轻的受访者、家庭规模较大的受访者、西班牙裔以及低收入群体。此外，金融素养较高的人更能应对此类冲击，这表明知识可以在大流行期间提供一些额外的保护。

28206.title: Job Satisfaction Over the Life Course
28206.zh_title: 整个生命历程中的工作满意度
28206.abstract: We examine the relationship between union membership and job satisfaction over the life-course using data from the National Child Development Study (NCDS) tracking all those born in Great Britain in a single week in March in 1958 through to age 55 (2013). Data from immigrants as well as non-respondents to the original 1958 Perinatal Mortality Study (PMS) are added in later years. Conditioning on one’s social class at birth, together with one’s education and employment status, we find there is a significant negative correlation between union membership and job satisfaction that is apparent across the life-course. Lagged union membership status going back many years is negatively correlated with current job satisfaction, though its effects become statistically non-significant when conditioning on current union membership status. These results provide a different perspective to longitudinal studies showing short-term positive responses to switches in membership status. They are consistent with earlier work showing that this cohort of workers, and others before them, have persistently lower job satisfaction as union members compared to their non-union counterparts.
28206.zh_abstract: 我们利用国家儿童发展研究的数据，考察了工会会员身份与工作满意度在整个生命历程中的关系。该研究追踪了1958年3月某一周内出生于英国的所有人，直至其55岁（2013年）。在后续年份中，还加入了移民以及1958年围产期死亡率研究的原始非受访者的数据。在控制了出生时的社会阶层以及教育和就业状况后，我们发现工会会员身份与工作满意度之间存在显著的负相关，这种关系在整个生命历程中都很明显。多年前的滞后工会会员身份与当前工作满意度呈负相关，但在控制当前工会会员身份后，其影响在统计上变得不显著。这些结果为显示会员身份转换带来短期积极反应的纵向研究提供了不同的视角。它们与早期研究一致，表明这一工人群体及其之前的群体，作为工会会员，其工作满意度持续低于非工会会员。

28205.title: School’s Out: Experimental Evidence on Limiting Learning Loss Using “Low-Tech” in a Pandemic
28205.zh_title: 学校停课：关于在大流行中使用“低技术”限制学习损失的实验证据
28205.authors: Noam Angrist, Peter Bergman, Moitshepi Matsheng
28205.abstract: Schools closed extensively during the COVID-19 pandemic and occur in other settings, such as teacher strikes and natural disasters. This paper provides some of the first experimental evidence on strategies to minimize learning loss when schools close. We run a randomized trial of low-technology interventions – SMS messages and phone calls – with parents to support their child. The combined treatment cost-effectively improves learning by 0.12 standard deviations. We develop remote assessment innovations, which show robust learning outcomes. Our findings have immediate policy relevance and long-run implications for the role of technology and parents as partial educational substitutes when schooling is disrupted.
28205.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19大流行期间，学校广泛停课，这种情况也发生在其他环境中，如教师罢工和自然灾害。本文提供了一些关于在学校停课时最小化学习损失策略的首批实验证据。我们进行了一项低技术干预措施——短信和电话——的随机试验，以支持家长帮助孩子。综合治疗成本有效地将学习效果提高了0.12个标准差。我们开发了远程评估创新，显示出稳健的学习成果。我们的发现具有直接的现实政策意义，并对当学校教育中断时，技术和家长作为部分教育替代者的角色具有长期启示。
28205.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, IO；JEL：I10, I20, I24, I25

28204.title: Granular Instrumental Variables
28204.authors: Xavier Gabaix, Ralph S. J. Koijen
28204.abstract: We propose a new way to construct instruments in a broad class of economic environments. In the economies we study, a few large firms, industries or countries account for an important share of economic activity. As the idiosyncratic shocks from these large players affect aggregate outcomes, they are valid and often powerful instruments. We provide a methodology to extract idiosyncratic shocks from the data and create “granular instrumental variables” (GIVs), which are size-weighted sums of idiosyncratic shocks. These GIVs allow us to then estimate parameters of interest, including causal elasticities and multipliers. We illustrate the idea in a basic supply and demand framework. GIVs provide a novel approach to identify both supply and demand elasticities based on idiosyncratic shocks to either supply or demand. We then show how to extend the basic procedure to cover a range of empirically relevant situations. As an application, we measure how “sovereign yield shocks” transmit across countries in the Eurozone. We sketch how GIVs could be useful to estimate a host of other causal parameters in economics.
28204.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种在广泛的经济环境中构建工具变量的新方法。在我们研究的经济体中，少数大型企业、行业或国家占据了经济活动的重要份额。由于这些大型参与者的特质冲击会影响总体结果，因此它们是有效且通常强有力的工具变量。我们提供了一种从数据中提取特质冲击并创建“颗粒工具变量”的方法，该变量是特质冲击的规模加权和。这些颗粒工具变量使我们能够估计感兴趣的参数，包括因果弹性和乘数。我们在一个基本的供需框架中阐述了这一思想。颗粒工具变量提供了一种基于供给或需求的特质冲击来识别供给和需求弹性的新方法。然后，我们展示了如何将基本程序扩展到涵盖一系列经验相关的情况。作为一个应用，我们衡量了“主权收益率冲击”如何在欧元区国家间传导。我们概述了颗粒工具变量如何有助于估计经济学中的许多其他因果参数。
28204.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, IO, LS, ME；JEL：C01, E0, F0, G0

28203.title: Revisiting the Entrepreneurial Commercialization of Academic Science: Evidence from “Twin” Discoveries
28203.zh_title: 重新审视学术科学的创业商业化：来自“双胞胎”发现的证据
28203.abstract: Which factors shape the commercialization of academic scientific discoveries via startup formation? Prior literature has identified several contributing factors but does not address the fundamental problem that the commercial potential of a nascent discovery is generally unobserved, which potentially confounds inference. We construct a sample of approximately 20,000 “twin” scientific articles, which allows us to hold constant differences in the nature of the advance and more precisely examine characteristics that predict startup commercialization. In this framework, several commonly-accepted factors appear not to influence commercialization. However, we find that teams of academic scientists whose former collaborators include “star” serial entrepreneurs are much more likely to commercialize their own discoveries via startups, as are more interdisciplinary teams of scientists.
28203.zh_abstract: 哪些因素通过初创企业形成塑造了学术科学发现的商业化？现有文献已经确定了几个促成因素，但没有解决一个根本问题，即新生发现的商业潜力通常是不可观测的，这可能会混淆推断。我们构建了一个约20,000篇“双胞胎”科学文章的样本，这使得我们能够控制进展性质的差异，并更精确地检查预测初创企业商业化的特征。在这个框架下，几个普遍接受的因素似乎并不影响商业化。然而，我们发现，其前合作者包括“明星”连续创业者的学术科学家团队，以及更具跨学科性的科学家团队，通过初创企业商业化自身发现的可能性要大得多。

28202.title: Police Force Size and Civilian Race
28202.authors: Aaron Chalfin, Benjamin Hansen, Emily K. Weisburst, Morgan C. Williams, Jr.
28202.abstract: We report the first empirical estimate of the race-specific effects of larger police forces in the United States. Each additional police officer abates approximately 0.1 homicides. In per capita terms, effects are twice as large for Black versus white victims. At the same time, larger police forces make more arrests for low-level “quality-of-life” offenses, with effects that imply a disproportionate burden for Black Americans. Notably, cities with large Black populations do not share equally in the benefits of investments in police manpower. Our results provide novel empirical support for the popular narrative that Black communities are simultaneously over and under-policed.
28202.zh_abstract: 我们报告了美国警察规模扩大对种族特定影响的首次实证估计。每增加一名警察，大约可减少0.1起凶杀案。按人均计算，对黑人受害者的影响是白人受害者的两倍。同时，更大的警察队伍会因低层次的“生活质量”犯罪而逮捕更多人，其影响意味着黑人美国人承受了不成比例的负担。值得注意的是，黑人人口众多的城市并未平等分享警察人力投资的收益。我们的结果为黑人社区同时被过度和不足警务化的流行说法提供了新颖的实证支持。
28202.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE；JEL：H72, J15, J18, K42

28201.title: Credit Frictions in the Great Recession
28201.authors: Patrick J. Kehoe, Pierlauro Lopez, Virgiliu Midrigan, Elena Pastorino
28201.abstract: Although a credit tightening is commonly recognized as a key determinant of the Great Recession, to date, it is unclear whether a worsening of credit conditions faced by households or by firms was most responsible for the downturn. Some studies have suggested that the household-side credit channel is quantitatively the most important one. Many others contend that the firm-side channel played a crucial role. We propose a model in which both channels are present and explicitly formalized. Our analysis indicates that the household-side credit channel is quantitatively more relevant than the firm-side credit channel. We then evaluate the relative benefits of a fixed-sized transfer to households and to firms that improves each group's access to credit. We find that the effects of such a transfer on employment are substantially larger when the transfer targets households rather than firms. Hence, we provide theoretical and quantitative support to the view that the employment decline during the Great Recession would have been less severe if instead of focusing on easing firms' access to credit, the government had expended an equal amount of resources to alleviate households' credit constraints.
28201.zh_abstract: 尽管信贷紧缩被普遍认为是导致大衰退的关键因素，但迄今为止，尚不清楚家庭或企业面临的信贷条件恶化对经济衰退的影响最大。一些研究表明，家庭侧信贷渠道在数量上最为重要。另有许多人则认为，企业侧渠道发挥了关键作用。我们提出了一个模型，其中两种渠道都存在并得到明确形式化。我们的分析表明，家庭侧信贷渠道在数量上比企业侧信贷渠道更为重要。然后，我们评估了向家庭和企业提供固定规模转移支付以改善各自信贷获取能力的相对收益。我们发现，当转移支付针对家庭而非企业时，这种转移支付对就业的影响要大得多。因此，我们从理论和数量上支持了以下观点：如果政府不是专注于缓解企业信贷获取，而是投入同等资源来缓解家庭信贷约束，那么大衰退期间的就业下降本不会如此严重。
28201.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, LS, ME；JEL：E24, E3, E32, E6, E62, G51, J2, J38, J6, J64

28200.title: COVID and the Economic Importance of In-Person K-12 Schooling
28200.zh_title: 新冠疫情与面对面K-12学校教育的经济重要性
28200.authors: David A. Green, Ali Karimirad, Gaëlle Simard-Duplain, Henry E. Siu
28200.abstract: The extent to which K-12 schools should remain open is at the forefront of discussions on long-term pandemic management. In this context, there has been little mention of the immediate importance of K-12 schooling for the rest of the economy. Eliminating in-person schooling reduces the amount of labour time parents of school-aged children have available to work, and therefore reduces income to those workers and the economy as a whole. We discuss two measures of economic importance, and how they can be modified to better reflect the vital role played by K-12 education. The first is its size, as captured by the fraction of GDP that is produced by that sector. The second is its centrality, reflecting how essential a sector is to the network of economic activity. Using data from Canada’s Census of Population and Symmetric Input-Output Tables, we show how accounting for this role dramatically increases the importance of K-12 schooling.
28200.zh_abstract: K-12学校是否应保持开放是长期疫情管理讨论的前沿问题。在此背景下，很少有人提及K-12学校教育对经济其他部门的直接重要性。取消面对面教学会减少学龄儿童父母可用于工作的时间，从而减少这些工人和整个经济的收入。我们讨论了两种衡量经济重要性的指标，以及如何修改它们以更好地反映K-12教育所起的关键作用。第一个是其规模，由该部门生产的GDP份额来衡量。第二个是其中心性，反映一个部门对经济活动网络的重要性。利用加拿大人口普查和对称投入产出表的数据，我们展示了考虑这一作用如何显著增加K-12学校教育的重要性。

28252.title: Why is Intermediating Houses so Difficult? Evidence from iBuyers
28252.zh_title: 为什么房屋中介如此困难？来自iBuyers的证据
28252.authors: Greg Buchak, Gregor Matvos, Tomasz Piskorski, Amit Seru
28252.abstract: We examine frictions in dealer intermediation in durable consumer goods markets through the lens of “iBuyers,” technology-driven entrants that facilitate transactions via online platforms and algorithmic pricing. iBuyers provide liquidity to households by bypassing the lengthy household-to-household sale process and earn a positive gross spread. However, their intermediation is limited to relatively liquid and easierto- value homes. We build and calibrate a dynamic search model with intermediaries facing adverse selection to quantify the economic frictions in this market. The central trade-off is that while providing liquidity requires fast transactions, this leads to less accurate valuations and exposes intermediaries to adverse selection. iBuyer technology offers a limited middle ground, enabling fast transactions with limited information loss, but it works best for liquid, easy-to-value homes. We then use our model to explore intermediation in durable goods markets, adjusting key asset and market properties based on (i) informational asymmetry, (ii) market liquidity, and (iii) the benefits of search driven by subjective value dispersion. Illiquid and hard-to-price assets, like homes, experience less intermediation, especially if underutilized during the process. In contrast, the greater homogeneity and easier pricing of goods like cars, along with their higher liquidity due to mobility, may help explain why intermediation in these markets has historically been higher.
28252.zh_abstract: 我们通过“iBuyers”（技术驱动型新进入者，通过在线平台和算法定价促进交易）的视角，考察了耐用品消费市场中经销商中介的摩擦。iBuyers通过绕过冗长的个人对个人销售流程为家庭提供流动性，并赚取正的总价差。然而，它们的中介服务仅限于相对流动性强且易于估值的房屋。我们构建并校准了一个包含面临逆向选择的中介的动态搜索模型，以量化该市场中的经济摩擦。核心权衡在于：提供流动性需要快速交易，但这会导致估值准确性降低，并使中介面临逆向选择。iBuyer技术提供了一个有限的中间地带，能够在信息损失有限的情况下实现快速交易，但它最适合流动性强、易于估值的房屋。然后，我们利用模型探索耐用品市场中的中介行为，根据（i）信息不对称、（ii）市场流动性和（iii）由主观价值分散驱动的搜索收益，调整关键资产和市场属性。流动性差且难以定价的资产（如房屋）经历的中介较少，尤其是在过程中未被充分利用的情况下。相比之下，汽车等商品更高的同质性和更易定价，加上其因流动性而带来的更高流动性，可能有助于解释为什么这些市场中的中介在历史上一直更高。
28252.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, PE, PR；JEL：G0, G2, G5, L0, R20

28251.title: Away from Home and Back: Coordinating (Remote) Workers in 1800 and 2020
28251.zh_title: 离家与归家：协调1800年和2020年的（远程）工作者
28251.authors: Réka Juhász, Mara P. Squicciarini, Nico Voigtländer
28251.abstract: This paper examines the future of remote work by drawing parallels between two contexts: The move from home to factory-based production during the Industrial Revolution and the shift to work from home today. Both are characterized by a similar trade-off: the potential productivity advantage of the new working arrangement made possible by technology (mechanization or ICT), versus organizational barriers such as coordinating workers. Using contemporary data, we show that organizational barriers seem to be present today. Without further technological or organizational innovations, remote work may not be here to stay just yet.
28251.zh_abstract: 本文通过类比两种情境来考察远程工作的未来：工业革命期间从家庭生产向工厂生产的转变，以及当今向居家工作的转变。两者都具有相似的权衡：新技术（机械化或信息通信技术）使新的工作安排成为可能，从而带来潜在的生产率优势，但同时也面临协调工作者等组织障碍。利用当代数据，我们表明组织障碍如今似乎仍然存在。如果没有进一步的技术或组织创新，远程工作可能还不会持久存在。
28251.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, POL, PR；JEL：F63, O14

28250.title: A Thousand Cuts: Cumulative Lead Exposure Reduces Academic Achievement
28250.zh_title: 千刀万剐：累积铅暴露降低学业成绩
28250.authors: Alex Hollingsworth, Mike Huang, Ivan J. Rudik, Nicholas J. Sanders
28250.abstract: We study how ambient lead exposure impacts learning in elementary school by leveraging a natural experiment where a large national automotive racing organization switched from leaded to unleaded fuel. We find increased levels and duration of exposure to lead negatively affect academic performance, shift the entire academic performance distribution, and negatively impact both younger and older children. A single average race emitted more than 10 kilograms of lead — a quantity similar to the total annual emissions of an airport or the median lead-emitting industrial facility in the United States. The average treated student in our setting has an expected income reduction of $\$5,200$ in present value terms. Avoiding said treatment has an effect size similar to improving teacher value added by one-fourth of a standard deviation, reducing class size by 3 students, or increasing school spending per pupil by $\$750$. The marginal impacts of lead are larger in impoverished, non-white counties, and among students with greater duration of exposure, even after controlling for the total quantity of exposure.
28250.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个自然实验——一家大型全国性汽车赛车组织从含铅燃料转向无铅燃料——研究了环境铅暴露如何影响小学生的学习。我们发现，铅暴露水平和持续时间的增加会对学业表现产生负面影响，会改变整个学业表现分布，并对年龄较小和较大的儿童均产生负面影响。一场普通比赛排放的铅超过10公斤——这一数量与美国一个机场或中位数铅排放工业设施的年总排放量相当。在我们的设定中，平均受处理学生预期收入现值减少5200美元。避免这种处理的效果大小相当于：将教师增值提高四分之一个标准差、将班级规模减少3名学生、或将每位学生的人均学校支出增加750美元。即使在控制了总暴露量之后，铅的边际影响在贫困的非白人县以及暴露持续时间更长的学生中更大。
28250.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EEE, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I14, I21, Q51, Q53

28249.title: Learning to Navigate a New Financial Technology: Evidence from Payroll Accounts
28249.zh_title: 学习驾驭新金融技术：来自工资账户的证据
28249.authors: Emily Breza, Martin Kanz, Leora F. Klapper
28249.abstract: How do inexperienced consumers learn to use a new financial technology? We present results from a field experiment that introduced payroll accounts in a population of largely unbanked factory workers in Bangladesh. In the experiment, workers in a treatment group received monthly wage payments into a bank or mobile money account while workers in a control group continued to receive wages in cash, with a subset also receiving an account without automatic wage payments. We find that exposure to payroll accounts leads to increased account use and consumer learning. Those receiving accounts with automatic wage payments learn to use the account without assistance, begin to use a wider set of account features, and learn to avoid illicit fees, which are common in emerging markets for consumer finance. The treatments have real effects, leading to increased savings and improvements in the ability to cope with unanticipated economic shocks. We conduct an additional audit study and find suggestive evidence of market externalities from consumer learning: mobile money agents are less likely to overcharge inexperienced customers in areas with higher levels of payroll account adoption. This suggests potentially important equilibrium effects of introducing accounts at scale.
28249.zh_abstract: 缺乏经验的消费者如何学习使用新的金融技术？我们展示了一项实地实验的结果，该实验在孟加拉国主要由无银行账户的工厂工人群体中引入了工资账户。实验中，处理组的工人每月通过银行或移动货币账户领取工资，而对照组的工人继续以现金领取工资，其中一部分人还获得了没有自动工资存入的账户。我们发现，接触工资账户会导致账户使用增加和消费者学习。那些获得自动工资存入账户的工人无需帮助就能学会使用账户，开始使用更广泛的账户功能，并学会避免非法费用，这在新兴消费金融市场中很常见。这些处理产生了实际效果，导致储蓄增加以及应对意外经济冲击的能力得到改善。我们进行了一项额外的审计研究，并发现了消费者学习产生市场外部性的提示性证据：在工资账户采用率较高的地区，移动货币代理商向缺乏经验的客户多收费的可能性较小。这表明大规模引入账户可能产生重要的均衡效应。

28248.title: Why Do Sectoral Employment Programs Work? Lessons from WorkAdvance
28248.zh_title: 为什么行业就业计划有效？来自WorkAdvance的教训
28248.authors: Lawrence F. Katz, Jonathan Roth, Richard Hendra, Kelsey Schaberg
28248.abstract: This paper examines the evidence from randomized evaluations of sector-focused training programs that target low-wage workers and combine upfront screening, occupational and soft skills training, and wraparound services. The programs generate substantial and persistent earnings gains (11 to 40 percent) following training completion. Theoretical mechanisms for program impacts are explored for the WorkAdvance demonstration. Earnings gains are generated by getting participants into higher-wage jobs in higher-earning industries and occupations not just by raising employment. Training in transferable and certifiable skills (likely under-provided from poaching concerns) and reductions of employment barriers to high-wage sectors for non-traditional workers appear to play key roles.
28248.zh_abstract: 本文考察了针对低工资工人的、以行业为重点的培训项目的随机评估证据，这些项目结合了前期筛选、职业和软技能培训以及全方位服务。这些项目在培训完成后产生了显著且持久的收入增长（11%至40%）。针对WorkAdvance示范项目，探讨了项目影响的理论机制。收入增长是通过让参与者进入收入更高行业和职业中的更高工资岗位实现的，而不仅仅是提高就业率。可转移和可认证技能（可能因担心被挖角而供给不足）的培训，以及为非传统工人减少进入高工资行业的就业障碍，似乎发挥了关键作用。

28247.title: A Macroeconomic Model of Healthcare Saturation, Inequality and the Output-Pandemia Tradeoff
28247.zh_title: 医疗饱和、不平等与产出-大流行病权衡的宏观经济模型
28247.authors: Enrique G. Mendoza, Eugenio I. Rojas, Linda L. Tesar, Jing Zhang
28247.abstract: COVID-19 became a global health emergency when it threatened the catastrophic collapse of health systems as demand for health goods and services and their relative prices surged. Governments responded with lockdowns and increases in transfers. Empirical evidence shows that lockdowns and healthcare saturation contribute to explain the cross-country variation in GDP drops even after controlling for COVID-19 cases and mortality. We explain this output-pandemia tradeoff as resulting from a shock to subsistence health demand that is larger at higher capital utilization in a model with entrepreneurs and workers. The health system moves closer to saturation as the gap between supply and subsistence narrows, which worsens consumption and income inequality. An externality distorts utilization, because firms do not internalize that lower utilization relaxes healthcare saturation. The optimal policy response includes lockdowns and transfers to workers. Quantitatively, strict lockdowns and large transfer hikes can be optimal and yield sizable welfare gains because they prevent a sharp rise in inequality. Welfare and output costs vary in response to small parameter changes or deviations from optimal policies. Weak lockdowns coupled with weak transfers programs are the worst alternative and yet are in line with what several emerging and least developed countries have implemented.
28247.zh_abstract: 当对健康商品和服务的需求及其相对价格飙升，威胁到卫生系统灾难性崩溃时，COVID-19成为了一场全球卫生紧急事件。各国政府以封锁和增加转移支付作为回应。实证证据表明，即使在控制了COVID-19病例和死亡率之后，封锁和医疗饱和也有助于解释各国GDP下降的差异。我们用一个包含企业家和工人的模型解释这种产出-大流行病权衡，认为它源于对生存健康需求的冲击，该冲击在资本利用率更高时更大。随着供给与生存需求之间的差距缩小，卫生系统更接近饱和，这加剧了消费和收入不平等。一种外部性扭曲了利用率，因为企业没有内化较低的利用率可以缓解医疗饱和。最优政策响应包括封锁和对工人的转移支付。从量化角度看，严格的封锁和大规模的转移支付增加可能是最优的，并能产生可观的福利收益，因为它们防止了不平等的急剧上升。福利和产出成本会因参数的小幅变化或对最优政策的偏离而有所不同。弱封锁加上弱转移支付计划是最糟糕的选择，然而这正是几个新兴国家和最不发达国家所实施的。

28246.title: School Closures During the 1918 Flu Pandemic
28246.zh_title: 1918年流感大流行期间的学校关闭
28246.authors: Philipp Ager, Katherine Eriksson, Ezra Karger, Peter Nencka, Melissa A. Thomasson
28246.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has reignited interest in responses to the 1918-19 influenza pandemic, the last comparable U.S. public health emergency. During both pandemics, many state and local governments made the controversial decision to close schools. We study the short- and long-run effects of 1918-19 pandemic-related school closures on children. We find precise null effects of school closures in 1918 on school attendance in 1919-20 using newly collected data on the exact timing of school closures for 168 cities in 1918-19. Linking affected children to their adult outcomes in the 1940 census, we also find precise null effects of school closures on adult educational attainment, wage income, non-wage income, and hours worked in 1940. Our results are not inconsistent with an emerging literature that finds negative short-run effects of COVID-19-related school closures on learning. The situation in 1918 was starkly different from today: (1) schools closed in 1918 for many fewer days on average, (2) the 1918 virus was much deadlier to young adults and children, boosting absenteeism even in schools that stayed open, and (3) the lack of effective remote learning platforms in 1918 may have reduced the scope for school closures to increase socioeconomic inequality.
28246.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行重新激发了人们对1918-19年流感大流行（美国上一次类似的公共卫生紧急事件）应对措施的兴趣。在这两次大流行期间，许多州和地方政府都做出了关闭学校的争议性决定。我们研究了1918-19年大流行相关学校关闭对儿童的短期和长期影响。利用新收集的关于1918-19年168个城市学校关闭确切时间的数据，我们发现1918年学校关闭对1919-20年入学率的影响精确为零。通过将受影响的儿童与他们在1940年人口普查中的成年结果联系起来，我们还发现学校关闭对成年后的教育程度、工资收入、非工资收入和1940年工作时长的影响精确为零。我们的结果与新兴文献中发现的COVID-19相关学校关闭对学习的负面短期影响并不矛盾。1918年的情况与今天截然不同：（1）1918年学校平均关闭天数少得多，（2）1918年的病毒对年轻人和儿童的致死率更高，即使是在保持开放的学校也导致缺勤率上升，（3）1918年缺乏有效的远程学习平台，可能减少了学校关闭加剧社会经济不平等的可能性。

28245.title: Early Career Setbacks and Women’s Career-Family Trade-Off
28245.zh_title: 早期职业挫折与女性的职业-家庭权衡
28245.authors: Itzik Fadlon, Frederik Plesner Lyngse, Torben Heien Nielsen
28245.abstract: We study how early career setbacks—in the form of worse initial job matches—have permanent labor and marriage market impacts differentially for males and females. We analyze the Danish physician labor market and exploit a randomized lottery that determines sorting into internships, which differ in the bundle of location and career opportunities they provide. Using administrative data for over fifteen years after the lottery experiment, we find that initial labor market sorting has important long-run effects on occupational choice and career trajectories for women only, which increases the gender earnings gap by 10-15 percent over the decades after graduation from medical school. We show that the differential gender sensitivity to setbacks is driven by women’s career-family trade-off, where women exhibit earlier and higher fertility and subsequently sort into more flexible but lower-paying jobs that facilitate their greater family responsibilities. Our findings have implications for policies aimed at gender equality, as they reveal how persistent gaps can arise even in settings with institutional equality of opportunity and they point to addressing family considerations and job flexibility as key channels.
28245.zh_abstract: 我们研究早期职业挫折——以较差的初始工作匹配形式——如何对男性和女性产生不同的持久劳动力市场和婚姻市场影响。我们分析了丹麦医生劳动力市场，并利用一个随机抽签来决定实习岗位的分配，这些岗位在提供的地点和职业机会组合上有所不同。利用抽签实验后超过十五年的行政数据，我们发现，初始劳动力市场分配仅对女性的职业选择和职业轨迹产生重要的长期影响，这导致在医学院毕业后的几十年里，性别收入差距扩大了10-15%。我们表明，女性对挫折的敏感性差异是由女性的职业-家庭权衡驱动的，即女性生育更早、生育率更高，随后转向更灵活但收入较低的工作，这些工作有助于她们承担更大的家庭责任。我们的发现对旨在实现性别平等的政策具有启示意义，因为它们揭示了即使在制度机会平等的情况下，持久的差距也可能出现，并指出将家庭考虑和工作灵活性作为关键渠道加以解决。
28245.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I11, I23, J01, J13, J16, J24, R23

28244.title: Estimating the Price Elasticity of Demand for Subways: Evidence from Mexico
28244.zh_title: 估算地铁需求的价格弹性：来自墨西哥的证据
28244.abstract: This paper uses fare changes in Mexico City, Guadalajara, and Monterrey to estimate the price elasticity of demand for urban rail transit. In two of the cases there is a significant fare increase (30%+), and in the third there is a 60-day fare holiday. Ridership responds sharply in the expected direction in all three cities, implying price elasticities which range across cities from -.23 to -.32. In addition, there is suggestive evidence that the temporary fare holiday led to a higher baseline level of ridership. These estimates are directly relevant for policymakers considering alternative pricing structures for urban rail. The paper discusses the relevant economic considerations and then shows how the estimated elasticities can be used to perform policy counterfactuals.
28244.zh_abstract: 本文利用墨西哥城、瓜达拉哈拉和蒙特雷的票价变化来估算城市轨道交通的需求价格弹性。在两种情况下，票价大幅上涨（超过30%），在第三种情况下，则有60天的票价免费期。在所有三个城市，客流量都按照预期方向急剧变化，由此得出的价格弹性在各城市间从-0.23到-0.32不等。此外，有提示性证据表明，临时票价免费期导致了一个更高的客流量基线水平。这些估计值对于考虑城市轨道交通替代定价结构的政策制定者具有直接相关性。本文讨论了相关的经济考量，然后展示了如何使用估算的弹性来进行政策反事实分析。

28243.title: Transhumant Pastoralism, Climate Change, and Conflict in Africa
28243.zh_title: 非洲的游牧畜牧业、气候变化与冲突
28243.abstract: We consider the effects of climate change on seasonally migrant populations that herd livestock – i.e., transhumant pastoralists – in Africa. Traditionally, transhumant pastoralists benefit from a cooperative relationship with sedentary agriculturalists whereby arable land is used for crop farming in the wet season and animal grazing in the dry season. Droughts can disrupt this arrangement by inducing pastoral groups to migrate to agricultural lands before the harvest, causing conflict to emerge. We examine this hypothesis by combining ethnographic information on the traditional locations of transhumant pastoralists and sedentary agriculturalists with high-resolution data on the location and timing of rainfall and violent conflict events in Africa from 1989–2018. We show that droughts in the territory of transhumant pastoralists lead to conflict in neighboring areas. Consistent with the hypothesis, these conflict events are concentrated in agricultural areas; they occur during the wet season and not the dry season; and they are due to rainfall’s impact on plant biomass growth. This mechanism explains a sizable proportion of conflict events in Africa, particularly civil conflicts and religious-extremist attacks. We find that the effects are muted in the presence of irrigation aid projects, but not in the presence of other forms of foreign aid. The effects approach zero as pastoral groups share more political power.
28243.zh_abstract: 我们考虑了气候变化对非洲季节性迁徙放牧人群（即游牧牧民）的影响。传统上，游牧牧民与定居农业者之间存在合作关系，即耕地用于雨季的农作物种植和旱季的牲畜放牧。干旱可能破坏这种安排，诱使牧民群体在收获前迁移到农业用地，从而导致冲突出现。我们通过将游牧牧民和定居农业者传统居住地的民族志信息，与1989-2018年非洲降雨和暴力冲突事件的位置及时间的高分辨率数据相结合，来检验这一假设。我们表明，游牧牧民领地内的干旱会导致邻近地区的冲突。与假设一致，这些冲突事件集中在农业区；它们发生在雨季而非旱季；并且是由于降雨对植物生物量增长的影响所致。这一机制解释了非洲相当大比例的冲突事件，特别是内战和宗教极端主义袭击。我们发现，在存在灌溉援助项目的情况下，这些影响会减弱，但在存在其他形式的外国援助时则不会。随着牧民群体分享更多政治权力，这些影响趋近于零。
28243.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, ITI, POL；JEL：N10, Q54, Z1

28242.title: In the Red: Overdrafts, Payday Lending and the Underbanked
28242.zh_title: 赤字：透支、发薪日贷款与缺乏银行服务者
28242.authors: Marco Di Maggio, Angela T. Ma, Emily Williams
28242.abstract: The reordering of transactions from "high-to-low" is a controversial bank practice thought to maximize fees paid by low-income customers on overdrawn accounts. We exploit multiple class-action lawsuits resulting in mandatory changes to this practice, coupled with payday lending data, to show that after banks cease high-to-low reordering, low-income individuals reduce borrowing from alternative lenders. These consumers increase consumption, experience long-term improvements in overall financial health, and gain access to lower-cost loans in the traditional system. These findings highlight that aggressive bank practices create a demand for alternative financial services, highlighting an important link between the traditional and alternative financial systems.
28242.zh_abstract: 将交易从“高到低”重新排序是一种有争议的银行做法，被认为可以最大化从透支账户的低收入客户那里收取的费用。我们利用多起集体诉讼导致强制改变这一做法的情况，结合发薪日贷款数据，表明在银行停止高到低重新排序后，低收入个人减少了从替代贷款机构的借款。这些消费者增加了消费，整体财务状况得到长期改善，并且能够获得传统体系中成本更低的贷款。这些发现突显出，激进的银行做法创造了对替代金融服务的需求，揭示了传统金融体系与替代金融体系之间的重要联系。

28240.title: When Workers Travel: Nursing Supply During COVID-19 Surges
28240.zh_title: 当工作者流动时：COVID-19激增期间的护理人员供给
28240.abstract: We study how short-term labor markets responded to an extraordinary demand shock during the COVID-19 pandemic. We use traveling nurse jobs - a market hospitals use to fill temporary staffing needs - to examine workers' willingness to move to places with larger demand shocks. We find a dramatic increase in market size during the pandemic, especially for those specialties central to COVID-19 care. The number of jobs increased far more than compensation, suggesting that labor supply to this fringe of the nursing market is quite elastic. To examine workers' willingness to move across different locations, we examine jobs in different locations on the same day, and find an even more elastic supply response. We show that part of this supply responsiveness comes from workers' willingness to travel longer distances for jobs when payment increases, suggesting that an integrated national market facilitates reallocating workers when demand surges. This implies that a simultaneous national demand spike might be harder for the market to accommodate rapidly.
28240.zh_abstract: 我们研究了短期劳动力市场如何应对COVID-19疫情期间的异常需求冲击。我们利用旅行护士职位——医院用来填补临时人员需求的市场——来考察工作者迁移到需求冲击更大地区的意愿。我们发现疫情期间市场规模急剧扩大，尤其是那些对COVID-19护理至关重要的专业。职位数量的增长远超薪酬增长，表明护理市场这一边缘的劳动力供给相当有弹性。为了考察工作者在不同地点间迁移的意愿，我们研究了同一天不同地点的职位，并发现了更具弹性的供给反应。我们表明，这种供给响应部分源于工作者在薪酬增加时愿意为工作旅行更远的距离，这表明一个整合的全国性市场有助于在需求激增时重新分配工作者。这意味着同时发生的全国性需求激增可能更难被市场快速容纳。
28240.meta: Programs：EH, LS；JEL：I11, J22, J30, J41, J61, R20

28239.title: Where Does Wealth Come From?
28239.authors: Sandra E. Black, Paul J. Devereux, Fanny Landaud, Kjell G. Salvanes
28239.abstract: Much attention has been given to rising wealth inequality in recent decades. However, understanding inequality requires an understanding of how wealth relates to the potential wealth an individual could accumulate and where this wealth comes from. Using administrative data from Norway, we create measures of potential wealth that abstract from differential consumption and spending behavior. We then examine how these measures relate to observed net wealth of individuals at a point in time and the role played by different sources of wealth in the distribution of potential wealth. We find that net wealth is a reasonable proxy for potential wealth, particularly in the tails of the distribution. Importantly, people in different parts of the potential wealth (or actual net wealth) distribution get their wealth from very different sources. Labor income is the most important determinant of wealth, except among the top 1%, where capital income and capital gains on financial assets become important. Inheritances and gifts are not an important determinant of wealth, even at the top of the wealth distribution. Finally, although inheritances are not important, parental wealth does influence child’s wealth; children of wealthy parents accumulate wealth from very different sources than children of less wealthy parents.
28239.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，财富不平等加剧的问题备受关注。然而，理解不平等需要理解财富与个人可能积累的潜在财富之间的关系，以及这些财富的来源。利用挪威的行政数据，我们创建了排除差异化消费和支出行为的潜在财富衡量指标。然后，我们考察了这些指标如何与个人在某一时点的观察到的净资产相关联，以及不同财富来源在潜在财富分布中的作用。我们发现，净资产是潜在财富的一个合理代理变量，尤其是在分布的尾部。重要的是，处于潜在财富（或实际净资产）分布不同位置的人，其财富来源截然不同。劳动收入是财富最重要的决定因素，除了前1%的人群，对他们而言，资本收入和金融资产资本收益变得重要。即使在财富分布的顶端，遗产和赠与也不是财富的重要决定因素。最后，尽管遗产不重要，但父母的财富确实会影响子女的财富；富裕父母的子女积累财富的来源与不太富裕父母的子女截然不同。

28238.title: A Panel Regression Approach to Holdings-based Fund Performance Measures
28238.zh_title: 基于持仓的基金业绩度量的面板回归方法
28238.authors: Wayne E. Ferson, Junbo L. Wang
28238.abstract: Portfolio performance measures using holdings data are panel regressions. The returns of a fund’s stocks are regressed on its lagged portfolio weights. Stock fixed effects isolate average performance from time-series predictive ability. Control variables condition fund performance on the characteristics of the stocks held. The long term performance of average holdings drives some of the classical measures, while predictive ability drives others. A “buy-and-hold drift,” where portfolio weights increase over time in the higher alpha stocks, affects performance measures. Investor flows respond to average performance net of the buy-and-hold drift.
28238.zh_abstract: 使用持仓数据的投资组合业绩度量是面板回归。基金的股票收益对其滞后投资组合权重进行回归。股票固定效应将平均业绩与时间序列预测能力分离开来。控制变量根据所持股票的特征来调整基金业绩。平均持仓的长期业绩驱动了一些经典度量指标，而预测能力则驱动了其他指标。一种“买入并持有漂移”，即投资组合权重随时间在较高阿尔法股票中增加，会影响业绩度量。投资者资金流会响应扣除买入并持有漂移后的平均业绩。

28237.title: Central Bank Digital Currency: When Price and Bank Stability Collide
28237.zh_title: 央行数字货币：当价格稳定与银行稳定冲突时
28237.authors: Linda Schilling, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Harald Uhlig
28237.abstract: A central bank digital currency, or CBDC, may provide an attractive alternative to traditional demand deposits held in private banks. When offering CBDC accounts, the central bank needs to confront classic issues of banking: conducting maturity transformation while providing liquidity to private customers who suffer “spending” shocks. We analyze these issues in a nominal version of a Diamond and Dybvig (1983) model, with an additional and exogenous price stability objective for the central bank. While the central bank can always deliver on its nominal obligations, runs can nonetheless occur, manifesting themselves either as excessive real asset liquidation or as a failure to maintain price stability. We demonstrate an impossibility result that we call the CBDC trilemma: of the three goals of efficiency, financial stability (i.e., absence of runs), and price stability, the central bank can achieve at most two.
28237.zh_abstract: 央行数字货币（CBDC）可能为私人银行的传统活期存款提供一种有吸引力的替代品。在提供CBDC账户时，央行需要面对经典的银行业问题：在向遭受“支出”冲击的私人客户提供流动性的同时，进行期限转换。我们在一个名义版本的Diamond和Dybvig（1983）模型中分析了这些问题，并为央行增加了一个外生的价格稳定目标。虽然央行总能履行其名义义务，但挤兑仍然可能发生，表现为过度的实际资产清算或未能维持价格稳定。我们证明了一个不可能结果，称之为CBDC三难困境：在效率、金融稳定（即无挤兑）和价格稳定这三个目标中，央行最多只能实现两个。

28236.title: Understanding Debt in the Older Population
28236.zh_title: 理解老年人口的债务问题
28236.authors: Annamaria Lusardi, Olivia S. Mitchell, Noemi Oggero
28236.abstract: Poor financial capability can erode well-being in later life. To explore debt and debt management among older Americans, age 51-61, we designed and analyzed a new module in the 2018 Health and Retirement Study along with information from the 2018 National Financial Capability Study. Even though this group should be at the peak of their retirement savings, it nevertheless carries debt due to student loans and unpaid medical bills; having children also contributes to carrying debt close to retirement. By contrast, the financially literate have more positive financial perceptions and behaviors. Specifically, being able to answer one additional financial literacy question correctly is associated with a higher probability of reporting an above average credit record and planning for retirement. Higher financial literacy is also linked to being less likely to carry excessive debt, being contacted by debt collectors, and carrying medical debt or student loans, even after accounting for a large range of demographics and other characteristics. Evidently, financial knowledge can help limit debt exposure at older ages.
28236.zh_abstract: 较差的财务能力会侵蚀晚年的福祉。为了探讨美国51-61岁老年人的债务和债务管理问题，我们设计并分析了2018年健康与退休研究中的一个新模块，以及2018年全国财务能力研究的信息。尽管这个群体应该处于退休储蓄的顶峰，但他们仍然因学生贷款和未付医疗账单而背负债务；有子女也导致在临近退休时背负债务。相比之下，具有财务素养的人拥有更积极的财务认知和行为。具体来说，能够多正确回答一个财务知识问题，与报告高于平均水平的信用记录和为退休做计划的更高概率相关。即使考虑了广泛的人口统计和其他特征，更高的财务素养也与不太可能背负过多债务、被收债人联系、以及背负医疗债务或学生贷款相关。显然，财务知识有助于限制老年时的债务风险。

28235.title: What Makes a Tax Evader?
28235.authors: Marcelo L. Bergolo, Martin Leites, Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Matias Strehl
28235.abstract: Why do some individuals evade taxes while others do not? We study this question using administrative tax records from Uruguay linked to a tailored survey of taxpayers. Using third-party reports, we measure individual income under-reporting as an indicator of evasion. We then examine how three factors predict who evades: social preferences (e.g., honesty measured through incentivized laboratory games), peers (e.g., the behavior of current and former coworkers), and economic factors (e.g., the marginal tax rate). We find that social preferences have little power to predict evasion, while economic factors matter more and peer behavior is the strongest predictor.
28235.zh_abstract: 为什么有些人逃税而另一些人不逃？我们利用乌拉圭的行政税务记录，并结合针对纳税人的定制调查来研究这个问题。利用第三方报告，我们衡量个人收入低报作为逃税的指标。然后，我们考察三个因素如何预测谁逃税：社会偏好（例如，通过激励性实验室游戏衡量的诚实度）、同伴（例如，现任和前任同事的行为）以及经济因素（例如，边际税率）。我们发现，社会偏好预测逃税的能力很弱，而经济因素更重要，同伴行为是最强的预测因素。
28235.meta: Programs：LE, PE；JEL：H24, H26, K42, Z1, Z13

28234.title: Social Networks Shape Beliefs and Behavior: Evidence from Social Distancing During the COVID-19 Pandemic
28234.zh_title: 社交网络塑造信念和行为：来自COVID-19疫情期间社交距离的证据
28234.authors: Michael Bailey, Drew M. Johnston, Martin Koenen, Theresa Kuchler, Dominic Russel, Johannes Stroebel
28234.abstract: We show that social network exposure to COVID-19 cases shapes individuals’ beliefs and behaviors concerning the coronavirus. We use de-identified data from Facebook to document that individuals with friends in areas with worse COVID-19 outbreaks reduce their mobility more than otherwise similar individuals with friends in less affected areas. The effects are quantitatively large and long-lasting: a one standard deviation increase in friend-exposure to COVID-19 cases in March 2020 results in a 1.2 percentage point increase in the probability of staying home on a given day through at least the end of May 2020. As the pandemic progresses—and the characteristics of individuals with the highest friend-exposure vary— changes in friend-exposure continue to drive changes in social distancing behavior, ruling out many unobserved effects as drivers of our results. We also show that individuals with higher friend-exposure to COVID-19 are more likely to publicly post in support of social distancing measures and less likely to be members of groups advocating to "reopen" the economy. These findings suggest that friends can influence individuals’ beliefs about the risks of the disease and thereby induce them to engage in mitigating public health behavior.
28234.zh_abstract: 我们表明，社交网络对COVID-19病例的暴露程度塑造了个人关于冠状病毒的信念和行为。我们利用来自Facebook的去标识化数据，记录了那些朋友所在地区COVID-19疫情更严重的个人，其流动性减少的程度超过了其他方面相似但朋友在受影响较小地区的个人。这些影响在数量上很大且持久：2020年3月朋友暴露于COVID-19病例的程度每增加一个标准差，会导致在给定日期（至少持续到2020年5月底）留在家中的概率增加1.2个百分点。随着疫情的进展——以及朋友暴露程度最高的个人特征发生变化——朋友暴露程度的变化继续驱动社交距离行为的变化，这排除了许多未观测到的效应作为我们结果驱动因素的可能性。我们还表明，朋友暴露于COVID-19程度更高的个人更有可能公开发布支持社交距离措施的帖子，并且不太可能成为倡导“重启”经济的团体的成员。这些发现表明，朋友可以影响个人对疾病风险的信念，从而促使他们采取缓解公共卫生的行为。
28234.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, EFG, EH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D83, D85, H0, I0

28233.title: The Impact of Covid-19 on Productivity
28233.zh_title: 新冠疫情对生产率的影响
28233.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Philip Bunn, Paul Mizen, Pawel Smietanka, Gregory Thwaites
28233.abstract: We analyse the impact of Covid-19 on productivity using data from an innovative monthly firm survey panel that asks for quantitative impacts of Covid on inputs and outputs. We find total factor productivity (TFP) fell by up to 5% during 2020-21. The overall impact combined large reductions in ‘within-firm’ productivity, with an offsetting positive ‘between-firm’ effects as less productive sectors, and less productive firms within them, contracted. Despite these large pandemic effects, firms’ post-Covid forecasts imply surprisingly little lasting impact on aggregate TFP. We also see significant heterogeneity over firms and sectors, with the greatest impacts in those requiring extensive in-person activity. We also ask about unmeasured inflation in the form of deteriorating product quality, finding an additional 1.4% negative impact on TFP.
28233.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项创新的月度企业调查面板数据，该数据询问了新冠疫情对投入和产出的量化影响，分析了疫情对生产率的影响。我们发现，2020-21年间全要素生产率下降了高达5%。总体影响包括“企业内部”生产率的大幅下降，以及“企业间”的正向抵消效应，即生产率较低的行业及其内部生产率较低的企业出现收缩。尽管存在这些显著的疫情效应，但企业疫情后的预测表明，疫情对总体全要素生产率的持久影响出奇地小。我们还观察到企业和行业之间存在显著的异质性，其中对需要大量面对面活动的行业影响最大。我们还调查了以产品质量下降形式存在的未计量通胀，发现这对全要素生产率造成了额外的1.4%的负面影响。

28232.title: U.S. Macro Policies and Global Economic Challenges
28232.zh_title: 美国宏观政策与全球经济挑战
28232.abstract: This paper overviews different exit strategies for the U.S. from the debt-overhang, and analyses their implications for emerging markets and global stability. These strategies are discussed in the context of the debates about secular-stagnation versus debt-overhang, the fiscal theory of the price level, the size of fiscal multipliers, prospects for a multipolar currency system, and historical case studies. We conclude that the reallocation of U.S. fiscal efforts towards infrastructure investment aiming at boosting growth, followed by a gradual tax increase, aiming at reaching a modest primary fiscal surplus over time are akin to an upfront investment in greater long-term global stability. Such a trajectory may solidify the viability and credibility of the U.S. dollar as a global anchor, thereby stabilizing Emerging Markets economies and global growth.
28232.zh_abstract: 本文概述了美国摆脱债务积压的不同退出策略，并分析了这些策略对新兴市场和全球稳定的影响。这些策略是在关于长期停滞与债务积压、价格水平的财政理论、财政乘数大小、多极货币体系前景以及历史案例研究的辩论背景下讨论的。我们得出结论，美国将财政努力重新分配至旨在促进增长的基础设施投资，随后逐步增税以实现适度的基本财政盈余，这类似于为更大的长期全球稳定进行前期投资。这样的路径可能巩固美元作为全球锚的可行性和可信度，从而稳定新兴市场经济体和全球增长。

28231.title: U.S.-China Innovation Competition
28231.authors: Gerard Hoberg, Huaizhou Li, Gordon M. Phillips
28231.abstract: We examine how foreign information access affects competition in innovation. We construct measures of Chinese information-gathering capacity based on industry geography and internet penetration. They predict actual Chinese-user downloads of U.S. firm filings. Increases in Chinese information access are followed by lower U.S. firm R&D, patent values, and patent grants. Chinese firms increase patenting in the same technology areas and cite more affected U.S. firms’ prior patents. The effects are stronger in more contested markets and in industries receiving Chinese government support. Placebo tests do not produce similar results. The evidence is consistent with Chinese innovation competition reducing U.S. innovation.
28231.zh_abstract: 我们研究了外国信息获取如何影响创新竞争。我们基于行业地理分布和互联网普及率构建了中国信息获取能力的衡量指标。这些指标预测了中国用户实际下载美国公司文件的情况。中国信息获取的增加，随后导致美国公司的研发投入、专利价值和专利授权量下降。中国公司在相同技术领域的专利申请增加，并更多地引用受影响美国公司的先前专利。这种效应在竞争更激烈的市场以及获得中国政府支持的行业中更为显著。安慰剂检验未产生类似结果。证据表明，中国的创新竞争减少了美国的创新。
28231.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, ITI, PR；JEL：D43, F13, L21, L26, O31, O34

28230.title: Long-Term Effects of Equal Sharing: Evidence from Inheritance Rules for Land
28230.zh_title: 平等分享的长期效应：来自土地继承规则的证据
28230.authors: Charlotte Bartels, Simon Jäger, Natalie Obergruber
28230.abstract: What are the long-term economic effects of a more equal distribution of wealth? We exploit variation in historical inheritance rules for land traversing political, linguistic, geological, and religious borders in Germany. In some German areas, inherited land was to be shared or divided equally among children, while in others land was ruled to be indivisible. Using a geographic regression discontinuity design, we show that equal division of land led to a more equal distribution of land; other potential drivers of growth are smooth at the boundary and equal division areas were not historically more developed. Today, equal division areas feature higher average incomes and a right-shifted skill, income, and wealth distribution. Higher top incomes and top wealth in equal division areas coincide with higher education, and higher labor productivity. We show evidence consistent with the more even distribution of land leading to more innovative industrial by-employment during Germany’s transition from an agrarian to an industrial economy and, in the long-run, more entrepreneurship.
28230.zh_abstract: 更平等的财富分配会带来哪些长期经济效应？我们利用德国境内跨越政治、语言、地质和宗教边界的土地历史继承规则差异。在德国某些地区，继承的土地必须在子女间平均分配或分割，而在其他地区，土地则被规定为不可分割。通过使用地理断点回归设计，我们发现土地的平均分配导致了更平等的土地分配；其他潜在的增长驱动因素在边界处是平滑的，且平均分配地区在历史上并未更发达。如今，平均分配地区的人均收入更高，技能、收入和财富分布呈右移态势。平均分配地区较高的顶层收入和顶层财富与更高的教育水平和更高的劳动生产率同时出现。我们提供的证据表明，在德国从农业经济向工业经济转型期间，更平等的土地分配导致了更具创新性的工业兼业活动，并在长期内促进了更多的创业活动。
28230.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：E02, H24, J24, J43, N13, N14, N23, N24, N33, N34, N53, N54, N93, N94, O3, P42, R52

28229.title: The Accuracy of Tax Imputations: Estimating Tax Liabilities and Credits Using Linked Survey and Administrative Data
28229.zh_title: 税收推算的准确性：利用关联调查与行政数据估算税收负债与税收抵免
28229.authors: Bruce D. Meyer, Derek Wu, Grace Finley, Patrick Langetieg, Carla Medalia, Mark Payne, Alan Plumley
28229.abstract: This paper calculates accurate estimates of income and payroll taxes using a groundbreaking set of linked survey and administrative tax data that are part of the Comprehensive Income Dataset (CID). We compare our estimates to survey imputations produced by the Census Bureau and those generated using the TAXSIM calculator from the National Bureau of Economic Research. The administrative data include two sets of Internal Revenue Service (IRS) data: (1) a limited set of tax information for the population of individual income tax returns covering selected line items from Forms 1040, W-2, and 1099-R; and (2) an extensive set of population tax records processed by the IRS in 2011, covering nearly every line item on Form 1040 and most lines on a series of third-party information returns. We link these IRS records to the Current Population Survey Annual Social and Economic Supplement (CPS) for reference year 2010. We describe how we form tax units and estimate various types of tax liabilities and credits using these linked data, providing a roadmap for constructing accurate measures of taxes while preserving the survey family as the sharing unit for distributional analyses. We find that aggregate estimates of various tax components using the limited and extensive tax data estimates are close to each other and much closer to public IRS tabulations than either of the imputations using survey data alone. At the individual level, the absolute errors of survey-only imputations of federal income taxes and total taxes are on average 10% and 13%, respectively, of adjusted gross income. In contrast, the limited tax data imputations yield mean absolute errors for federal income taxes and total taxes that are about 2% and 3% of adjusted gross income, respectively. For the Earned Income Tax Credit, the limited tax data imputation is off by less than $\$20$ on average for a typical family (compared to more than $\$500$ using either of the survey-only imputations).
28229.zh_abstract: 本文利用综合收入数据集中一组开创性的关联调查和行政税收数据，计算了所得税和工资税的准确估计值。我们将我们的估计值与人口普查局产生的调查推算值以及国家经济研究局TAXSIM计算器生成的推算值进行了比较。行政数据包括两套美国国税局数据：（1）针对个人所得税申报表总体的有限税收信息，涵盖1040表、W-2表和1099-R表的选定行项目；（2）2011年由国税局处理的一套广泛的总体税收记录，涵盖了1040表几乎每个行项目以及一系列第三方信息申报表的大部分行项目。我们将这些国税局记录与参考年份2010年的当前人口调查年度社会与经济补充调查进行了关联。我们描述了如何形成税收单位，并利用这些关联数据估算各种类型的税收负债和税收抵免，为构建准确的税收衡量指标提供了路线图，同时保留调查家庭作为分配分析中的共享单位。我们发现，使用有限和广泛税收数据估计的各种税收组成部分的总量估计值彼此接近，并且比仅使用调查数据的推算值更接近国税局的公开表格。在个体层面，仅使用调查数据推算的联邦所得税和总税收的绝对误差平均分别约为调整后总收入的10%和13%。相比之下，有限税收数据推算的联邦所得税和总税收的平均绝对误差分别约为调整后总收入的2%和3%。对于劳动所得税抵免，有限税收数据推算的典型家庭平均误差不到20美元（而使用两种仅基于调查的推算方法，误差均超过500美元）。
28229.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：C42, C81, H20, H24, I32

28228.title: Probability Assessments of an Ice-Free Arctic: Comparing Statistical and Climate Model Projections
28228.zh_title: 无冰北极的概率评估：比较统计模型与气候模型预测
28228.authors: Francis X. Diebold, Glenn D. Rudebusch
28228.abstract: The downward trend in the amount of Arctic sea ice has a wide range of environmental and economic consequences including important effects on the pace and intensity of global climate change. Based on several decades of satellite data, we provide statistical forecasts of Arctic sea ice extent during the rest of this century. The best fitting statistical model indicates that overall sea ice coverage is declining at an increasing rate. By contrast, average projections from the CMIP5 global climate models foresee a gradual slowing of Arctic sea ice loss even in scenarios with high carbon emissions. Our long-range statistical projections also deliver probability assessments of the timing of an ice-free Arctic. These results indicate almost a 60 percent chance of an effectively ice-free Arctic Ocean sometime during the 2030s—much earlier than the average projection from the global climate models.
28228.zh_abstract: 北极海冰数量的下降趋势具有广泛的环境和经济后果，包括对全球气候变化速度和强度的重大影响。基于几十年的卫星数据，我们提供了本世纪剩余时间内北极海冰范围的统计预测。最佳拟合的统计模型表明，总体海冰覆盖面积正以加速的速度减少。相比之下，CMIP5全球气候模型的平均预测显示，即使在碳排放量高的情景下，北极海冰的损失也会逐渐放缓。我们的长期统计预测还提供了无冰北极出现时间的概率评估。这些结果表明，在2030年代期间，北极洋出现实际上无冰的概率接近60%——这比全球气候模型的平均预测要早得多。

28227.title: A Model of Occupational Licensing and Statistical Discrimination
28227.zh_title: 职业许可与统计歧视模型
28227.authors: Peter Q. Blair, Bobby W. Chung
28227.abstract: We develop a model of statistical discrimination in occupational licensing. In the model, there is endogenous occupation selection and wage determination that depends on how costly it is to obtain the license and the productivity of the human capital that is bundled with the license. Under these assumptions, we find a unique equilibrium with sharp comparative statics for the licensing premiums. The key theoretical result in this paper is that the licensing premium is higher for workers who are members of demographic groups that face a higher cost of licensing. The intuition for this result is that the higher cost of licensing makes the license a more informative labor market signal. The predictions of the model can explain, for example, the empirical finding in the literature that occupational licenses that preclude felons close the racial wage gap among men by conferring a higher premium to black men than white men. Moreover, we show that in general the optimal cost of licensing is non-zero: an infinitely costly license screens out all workers while a cost less license is no screen at all.
28227.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个职业许可中的统计歧视模型。在该模型中，存在内生的职业选择和工资决定，这取决于获得许可的成本以及与许可捆绑的人力资本的生产率。在这些假设下，我们找到了一个唯一的均衡，并对许可溢价进行了清晰的比较静态分析。本文的关键理论结果是，对于面临更高许可成本的群体成员来说，许可溢价更高。这一结果的直觉是，更高的许可成本使得许可成为更具信息量的劳动力市场信号。该模型的预测可以解释，例如，文献中的实证发现：禁止重罪犯的职业许可通过给予黑人男性比白人男性更高的溢价，缩小了男性间的种族工资差距。此外，我们表明，一般而言，最优的许可成本不为零：无限高的许可成本会筛选掉所有工人，而零成本的许可则根本无法起到筛选作用。
28227.meta: Programs：ED, IO, LE, LS；JEL：D21, J31, J7, K31, L51, M5

28226.title: Climate Finance
28226.authors: Stefano Giglio, Bryan T. Kelly, Johannes Stroebel
28226.abstract: We review the literature studying interactions between climate change and financial markets. We first discuss various approaches to incorporating climate risk in macro-finance models. We then review the empirical literature that explores the pricing of climate risks across a large number of asset classes including real estate, equities, and fixed income securities. In this context, we also discuss how investors can use these assets to construct portfolios that hedge against climate risk. We conclude by proposing several promising directions for future research in climate finance.
28226.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了研究气候变化与金融市场相互作用的文献。我们首先讨论了将气候风险纳入宏观金融模型的各种方法。然后，我们回顾了探索气候风险在包括房地产、股票和固定收益证券在内的多种资产类别中定价的实证文献。在此背景下，我们还讨论了投资者如何利用这些资产构建对冲气候风险的投资组合。最后，我们提出了气候金融未来研究的几个有前景的方向。

28225.title: The Story of the Real Exchange Rate
28225.abstract: The real exchange rate (RER) measures relative price levels across countries, capturing deviations from purchasing power parity (PPP). RER is a key variable in international macroeconomic models as it is central to equilibrium conditions in both goods and asset markets. It is also one of the most starkly-behaved variables empirically, tightly co-moving with the nominal exchange rate and virtually uncorrelated with most other macroeconomic variables, nominal or real. This survey lays out an equilibrium framework of RER determination, focusing separately on each building block and discussing corresponding empirical evidence. We emphasize home bias and incomplete pass-through into prices with expenditure switching and goods market clearing, imperfect international risk sharing, country budget constraint and monetary policy regime. We show that RER is inherently a general-equilibrium variable, which depends on the full model structure and policy regime, and therefore partial theories like PPP are insufficient to explain it. We also discuss issues of stationarity and predictability of exchange rates.
28225.zh_abstract: 实际汇率衡量了各国之间的相对价格水平，反映了对购买力平价的偏离。实际汇率是国际宏观经济模型中的一个关键变量，因为它对商品市场和资产市场的均衡条件都至关重要。在实证上，它也是最表现鲜明的变量之一，与名义汇率紧密联动，并且与大多数其他宏观经济变量（无论是名义的还是实际的）几乎不相关。本综述构建了一个实际汇率决定的均衡框架，分别聚焦于每个组成部分并讨论相应的实证证据。我们强调了国内偏好、包含支出转换和商品市场出清的不完全汇率传递、不完美的国际风险分担、国家预算约束以及货币政策制度。我们表明，实际汇率本质上是一个一般均衡变量，它依赖于完整的模型结构和政策制度，因此像购买力平价这样的局部理论不足以解释它。我们还讨论了汇率平稳性和可预测性的问题。
28225.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E31, F31, F41, G15

28224.title: World War I and the Restructuring of International Business
28224.zh_title: 第一次世界大战与国际商业的重组
28224.abstract: This paper considers the effect of the First World War on large-scale businesses in Second-Industrial-Revolution industries like steel, electricity, and chemicals. For firms in the nations of the Entente, we argue, the war mainly interrupted long-term trends that resumed in the aftermath of the conflict. For Germany, however, the war and its subsequent territorial settlements had a disruptive impact on the economic geography of key industries. The global restructuring that resulted from the collapse of the Habsburg, Romanov, and Ottoman empires and Germany’s loss of its colonial possessions set up a new kind of international rivalry as German firms sought to regain their dominance by contracting with emerging nations in the European periphery and the Global South to build industrial capacity, forcing Britain and the now capital-rich United States to compete for this business or see their influence in these areas decline. The end result of this rivalry was the construction of massive steel works in Brazil and other industrializing countries around the world. These investments would provide the foundation for the import-substituting policies of the post-World War II era.
28224.zh_abstract: 本文考虑了第一次世界大战对第二次工业革命中如钢铁、电力和化工等行业的大型企业的影响。我们认为，对于协约国国家的企业而言，战争主要中断了长期趋势，这些趋势在冲突结束后得以恢复。然而，对于德国来说，战争及其后续的领土解决方案对关键产业的经济地理产生了破坏性影响。哈布斯堡、罗曼诺夫和奥斯曼帝国的崩溃以及德国失去其殖民地所导致的全球重组，引发了一种新型的国际竞争，德国企业试图通过与欧洲边缘地区和全球南方的新兴国家签订合同来建设工业能力，从而重新获得其主导地位，这迫使英国和现在资本充裕的美国为这项业务展开竞争，否则它们在这些地区的影响力就会下降。这种竞争的最终结果是，在巴西和世界各地其他工业化国家建设了大型钢铁厂。这些投资将为二战后进口替代政策奠定基础。

28223.title: Does Eye-Tracking Have an Effect on Economic Behavior?
28223.zh_title: 眼动追踪对经济行为有影响吗？
28223.authors: Jennifer Kee, Melinda Knuth, Joanna Lahey, Marco A. Palma
28223.abstract: Eye-tracking is becoming an increasingly popular tool for understanding the underlying behavior driving economic decisions. However, an important unanswered methodological question is whether the use of an eye-tracking device itself induces changes in the behavior of experiment participants. We study this question using eight popular games in experimental economics. We implement a simple design where participants are randomly assigned to either a control or an eye-tracking treatment condition. In seven of the eight games, eye-tracking did not produce different outcomes. In the Holt and Laury risk assessment (HL), subjects with multiple calibration attempts behave like outliers under eye-tracking conditions, skewing the overall results. Further exploration shows that poor calibrators also show marginally higher levels of negative emotion, which is correlated with higher risk aversion in both HL and in the Eckel and Grossman gambling tasks. Because difficulty calibrating is correlated with eye-tracking data quality, the standard practice of removing participants who did not have good eye-tracking data quality resulted in no difference between the treatment and control groups in HL. Our results suggest that experiments may incorporate eye-tracking equipment without inducing changes in the economic behavior of participants, particularly after observations with low eye-tracking quality are removed.
28223.zh_abstract: 眼动追踪正成为一种越来越流行的工具，用于理解驱动经济决策的潜在行为。然而，一个重要的未解决的方法论问题是，使用眼动追踪设备本身是否会导致实验参与者行为的变化。我们使用实验经济学中的八个流行博弈来研究这个问题。我们实施了一个简单的设计，参与者被随机分配到对照组或眼动追踪处理条件。在八个博弈中的七个中，眼动追踪没有产生不同的结果。在Holt和Laury风险评估中，经过多次校准尝试的受试者在眼动追踪条件下表现得像异常值，从而扭曲了整体结果。进一步探索表明，校准不佳的受试者也表现出略高的负面情绪水平，这与在Holt和Laury以及Eckel和Grossman赌博任务中更高的风险厌恶相关。由于校准困难与眼动追踪数据质量相关，移除没有良好眼动追踪数据质量的参与者的标准做法导致在Holt和Laury中处理组和对照组之间没有差异。我们的结果表明，实验可以纳入眼动追踪设备而不会引起参与者经济行为的变化，特别是在移除眼动追踪质量低的观测值之后。

28222.title: Measuring Racial Discrimination in Algorithms
28222.zh_title: 衡量算法中的种族歧视
28222.authors: David Arnold, Will S. Dobbie, Peter Hull
28222.abstract: There is growing concern that the rise of algorithmic decision-making can lead to discrimination against legally protected groups, but measuring such algorithmic discrimination is often hampered by a fundamental selection challenge. We develop new quasi-experimental tools to overcome this challenge and measure algorithmic discrimination in the setting of pretrial bail decisions. We first show that the selection challenge reduces to the challenge of measuring four moments: the mean latent qualification of white and Black individuals and the race-specific covariance between qualification and the algorithm’s treatment recommendation. We then show how these four moments can be estimated by extrapolating quasi-experimental variation across as-good-as-randomly assigned decision-makers. Estimates from New York City show that a sophisticated machine learning algorithm discriminates against Black defendants, even though defendant race and ethnicity are not included in the training data. The algorithm recommends releasing white defendants before trial at an 8 percentage point (11 percent) higher rate than Black defendants with identical potential for pretrial misconduct, with this unwarranted disparity explaining 77 percent of the observed racial disparity in algorithmic recommendations. We find a similar level of algorithmic discrimination with regression-based recommendations, using a model inspired by a widely used pretrial risk assessment tool.
28222.zh_abstract: 人们越来越担心算法决策的兴起可能导致对受法律保护群体的歧视，但衡量这种算法歧视常常受到一个基本的选择性挑战的阻碍。我们开发了新的准实验工具来克服这一挑战，并在审前保释决策的背景下衡量算法歧视。我们首先表明，选择性挑战简化为衡量四个矩的挑战：白人和黑人个体的平均潜在资格，以及资格与算法处理建议之间的种族特定协方差。然后，我们展示了如何通过外推跨准随机分配决策者的准实验变化来估计这四个矩。来自纽约市的估计显示，一个复杂的机器学习算法歧视黑人被告，尽管被告的种族和族裔并未包含在训练数据中。该算法建议在审前释放白人被告的比率比具有相同审前不当行为潜力的黑人被告高出8个百分点（11%），这种无根据的差异解释了算法建议中观察到的种族差异的77%。我们使用受广泛使用的审前风险评估工具启发的模型，在基于回归的建议中发现了类似水平的算法歧视。

28221.title: Issuance and Incidence: SNAP Benefit Cycles and Grocery Prices
28221.zh_title: 发放与归宿：SNAP福利周期与食品杂货价格
28221.authors: Jacob Goldin, Tatiana Homonoff, Katherine Meckel
28221.abstract: Many safety-net programs issue benefits as monthly lump-sum payments. We investigate how the timing of Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) benefit issuance affects food purchases and the incidence of the transfer. Using retail scanner data from a large sample of grocery stores and state and time variation in SNAP issuance schedules, we document large, SNAP-induced intra-month cycles in food expenditures. However, we find that retailers do not adjust prices based on these predictable patterns of demand. Our results therefore suggest that reforming issuance schedules reduce costs from SNAP-induced demand surges but are unlikely to affect the incidence of SNAP benefits.
28221.zh_abstract: 许多安全网项目以每月一次性支付的形式发放福利。我们调查了补充营养援助计划福利发放的时间安排如何影响食品购买和转移支付的归宿。使用来自大量食品杂货店样本的零售扫描数据以及各州和时间的SNAP发放计划差异，我们记录了由SNAP引起的、在月度内食品支出的大幅周期波动。然而，我们发现零售商并未根据这些可预测的需求模式调整价格。因此，我们的结果表明，改革发放计划可以减少由SNAP引起的需求激增带来的成本，但不太可能影响SNAP福利的归宿。

28220.title: Maternal Mortality Risk and Spousal Differences in the Demand for Children
28220.zh_title: 孕产妇死亡风险与配偶在子女需求上的差异
28220.authors: Nava Ashraf, Erica M. Field, Alessandra Voena, Roberta Ziparo
28220.abstract: Fertility decisions are often made by partners who may disagree. We develop a model in which conflicting interests prevent effective communication between spouses about the costs of child-bearing incurred by women. This mechanism is likely to further widen the spousal disagreement over fertility in environments where maternal health risk is high and imperfectly observed. We design an intervention to experimentally vary exposure to information about maternal health costs to either the husband or the wife among approximately 500 couples in Lusaka, Zambia. At baseline, husbands exhibit lower knowledge of maternal health risk compared to their wives. One year after the intervention, husbands significantly update their beliefs about maternal risk but only if the information is delivered directly to them, whereas wives update their beliefs about risk regardless of who in the household is treated. The intra-household asymmetry in information spillovers is strongest among men with more urgent demand for children. Households treated with information on maternal risk experience a sizable reduction in the probability of pregnancy - an effect which is strongest when the woman faces a higher risk of complications - but only when the information is delivered to wives rather than husbands is this decline in fertility accompanied by a significant reduction in transfers to the wife. These patterns are consistent with differences in initial beliefs and demand for children generating a barrier to credible communication between spouses.
28220.zh_abstract: 生育决策通常由可能存在分歧的伴侣共同做出。我们构建了一个模型，其中利益冲突阻碍了配偶之间就女性承担的生育成本进行有效沟通。在孕产妇健康风险高且未被完美观察的环境中，这种机制可能进一步扩大配偶在生育问题上的分歧。我们在赞比亚卢萨卡的大约500对夫妇中设计了一项干预措施，通过实验改变丈夫或妻子接触孕产妇健康成本信息的情况。在基线时，与妻子相比，丈夫对孕产妇健康风险的了解较少。干预一年后，丈夫显著更新了他们对孕产妇风险的信念，但前提是信息直接传达给他们；而无论家庭中谁接受了处理，妻子都会更新她们对风险的信念。在子女需求更迫切的男性中，信息溢出的家庭内不对称性最强。接受孕产妇风险信息处理的家庭，怀孕概率显著降低——当女性面临更高的并发症风险时，这种效应最强——但只有当信息传达给妻子而非丈夫时，这种生育率的下降才伴随着向妻子转移支付的显著减少。这些模式与初始信念和子女需求的差异在配偶之间造成可信沟通障碍的情况一致。

28219.title: Who Values Future Energy Savings? Evidence from American Drivers
28219.zh_title: 谁看重未来的能源节省？来自美国驾驶员的证据
28219.abstract: Regulators attest that tightened energy efficiency standards save consumers money.
