Efficient light bulbs, appliances, and vehicles cost more upfront but reduce energy expenses by more than enough to compensate. We use survey data on American cars and their drivers to examine whether individual drivers have indeed underinvested in fuel economy, given the gas prices they face and the miles they drive. We find that may be true, but only on average. Some drivers could likely have saved money by spending more upfront for efficient cars. But many others could have saved money purchasing less expensive, less fuel-efficient cars. In fact we find little correlation between individual drivers’ annual fuel expenditures and their fuel economy choices: a driver’s income, sex, age, and education are far more closely associated with their vehicle’s fuel economy. We can rule out several explanations for the disconnect. Rich car purchasers do not seem to consider fuel expenses any more than poorer ones, undermining arguments that borrowing constraints prevent low-income consumers from investing in fuel efficiency. And the disconnect between fuel expenses and vehicle choice holds whether we examine anticipated or realized mileage, ruling out mistaken expectations about future driving as an explanation.
28219.zh_abstract: 监管机构声称，更严格的能效标准能为消费者省钱。节能灯泡、电器和车辆的前期成本更高，但减少的能源支出足以弥补这一成本。我们使用美国汽车及其驾驶员的调查数据，考察个体驾驶员是否确实在燃油经济性方面投资不足，考虑到他们面临的气油价格和驾驶里程。我们发现这可能是真的，但仅限于平均水平。一些驾驶员可能通过为高效汽车支付更多前期费用来省钱。但许多其他驾驶员可能通过购买更便宜、燃油效率较低的汽车来省钱。事实上，我们发现个体驾驶员的年度燃油支出与其燃油经济性选择之间几乎没有相关性：驾驶员的收入、性别、年龄和教育程度与其车辆的燃油经济性关联更为密切。我们可以排除几种关于这种脱节的解释。富裕的购车者似乎并不比贫穷的购车者更考虑燃油费用，这削弱了借贷约束阻止低收入消费者投资燃油效率的论点。而且，无论我们考察预期里程还是实际里程，燃油支出与车辆选择之间的脱节都存在，排除了对未来驾驶的错误预期作为解释。

28289.title: Exporting from China: The Determinants of Trade Status
28289.zh_title: 中国出口：贸易状态的决定因素
28289.authors: Russell Cooper, Guan Gong, Guanliang Hu, Ping Yan
28289.abstract: This paper studies the exporting decision of Chinese manufacturing firms. The economic framework stresses the dynamic decision by both state controlled and private entities to export in a model with labor adjustment costs. In this complex environment, a simple decision rule whereby export status depends only on current productivity does not hold. Nor does this rule match data patterns. The estimated model is used to understand the factors that influence export status. The analysis highlights the economic significance of labor adjustment costs in shaping both employment and trade dynamics.
28289.zh_abstract: 本文研究了中国制造业企业的出口决策。经济框架强调了在存在劳动力调整成本的模型中，国有和私营实体进行出口的动态决策。在这种复杂环境下，简单的决策规则——即出口状态仅取决于当前生产率——并不成立。这一规则也不符合数据模式。我们利用估计的模型来理解影响出口状态的因素。分析凸显了劳动力调整成本在塑造就业和贸易动态方面的经济重要性。

28288.title: Detecting Drivers of Behavior at an Early Age: Evidence from a Longitudinal Field Experiment
28288.zh_title: 早期行为驱动因素的检测：来自纵向现场实验的证据
28288.authors: Marco Castillo, John A. List, Ragan Petrie, Anya Samek
28288.abstract: We use field experiments with nearly 900 children to investigate how skills developed at ages 3-5 drive later-life outcomes. We find that skills map onto three distinct factors - cognitive skills, executive functions, and economic preferences. Returning to the children up to 7 years later, we find that executive functions, but not cognitive skills, predict the likelihood of receiving disciplinary referrals. Economic preferences have an independent effect: children who displayed impatience at ages 3-5 were more likely to receive disciplinary referrals. Random assignment to a parenting program reduced disciplinary referrals. This effect was not mediated by skills or preferences.
28288.zh_abstract: 我们利用涉及近900名儿童的现场实验，研究3-5岁期间发展的技能如何影响后期生活结果。我们发现这些技能映射到三个不同的因素：认知技能、执行功能和经济偏好。在长达7年后对这些儿童进行回访时，我们发现执行功能（而非认知技能）能预测受到纪律处分的可能性。经济偏好具有独立影响：在3-5岁时表现出不耐烦的儿童更有可能受到纪律处分。随机分配参加育儿项目减少了纪律处分。这一效应并非由技能或偏好所中介。
28288.meta: Programs：CH, ED；JEL：C91, C93, D12, D81, I21, I26

28287.title: Infrastructure and Urban Form
28287.abstract: Cities are shaped by transportation infrastructure. Older cities were anchored by waterways. Nineteenth century cities followed the path of streetcars and subways. The 20th century city rebuilt itself around the car. The close connection between transportation and urban form is natural, since cities are defined by their density. Physical proximity and transportation investments serve the common cause of reducing the transportation costs for goods, people and ideas. The close connection between transportation and urban form suggests the need for spatial equilibrium models that embed a full set of equilibrium effects into any evaluation of transportation spending. Their connection implies that restrictions on land use will change, and often reduce, the value of investing in transportation infrastructure. Future transportation innovations, including autonomous vehicles and telecommuting, are likely to also change urban form, although cities often take decades to adapt to new forms of mobility.
28287.zh_abstract: 城市由交通基础设施塑造。较老的城市以水道为锚点。19世纪的城市沿着有轨电车和地铁的路径发展。20世纪的城市围绕汽车重建自身。交通与城市形态之间的紧密联系是自然的，因为城市由其密度定义。物理邻近性和交通投资服务于共同目标，即降低商品、人员和思想的运输成本。交通与城市形态之间的紧密联系表明，需要空间均衡模型，将全套均衡效应嵌入任何交通支出的评估中。它们的联系意味着对土地利用的限制将改变并通常降低交通基础设施投资的价值。未来的交通创新，包括自动驾驶汽车和远程办公，也可能改变城市形态，尽管城市通常需要数十年才能适应新的出行方式。

28286.title: Who Supplies PPP Loans (And Does it Matter)? Banks, Relationships and the COVID Crisis
28286.zh_title: 谁提供PPP贷款（这重要吗）？银行、关系与新冠疫情危机
28286.abstract: We analyze bank supply of credit under the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP). The literature emphasizes relationships as a means to improve lender information, which helps banks manage credit risk. Despite imposing no risk, however, PPP supply reflects traditional measures of relationship lending: decreasing in bank size; increasing in prior experience, in commitment lending, and in core deposits. Our results suggest a new benefit of bank relationships, as they help firms access government-subsidized lending. Consistent with this benefit, we show that bank PPP supply, based on the structure of the local banking sector, alleviates increases in unemployment.
28286.zh_abstract: 我们分析了银行在薪资保护计划（PPP）下的信贷供给。文献强调关系是改善贷款人信息的手段，有助于银行管理信用风险。然而，尽管PPP不施加风险，其供给仍反映了传统的关系贷款衡量指标：随银行规模增大而减少；随先前经验、承诺贷款和核心存款的增加而增加。我们的结果表明银行关系的一个新益处，即它们帮助企业获得政府补贴贷款。与此益处一致，我们表明基于当地银行部门结构的银行PPP供给缓解了失业率的上升。

28285.title: Digital Capital and Superstar Firms
28285.zh_title: 数字资本与超级明星企业
28285.authors: Prasanna Tambe, Lorin Hitt, Daniel Rock, Erik Brynjolfsson
28285.abstract: General purpose technologies like information technology typically require complementary firm-specific investments to create value. These complementary investments produce a form of capital, which is typically intangible and which we call digital capital. We create an extended firm-level panel on IT labor investments (1990-2016) using data from LinkedIn. We then apply Hall’s Quantity Revelation Theorem to compute both prices and quantities of digital capital over recent decades. We find that 1) digital capital prices vary significantly over time, peaking around the dot-com boom in 2000, 2) significant digital capital quantities have accumulated since the 1990s, with digital capital accounting for at least 25% of firms’ assets by the end of our panel, 3) that digital capital has disproportionately accumulated in a small subset of “superstar” firms and its concentration is much greater than the concentration of other assets, and 4) that digital capital accumulation predicts firm-level productivity about three years in the future.
28285.zh_abstract: 像信息技术这样的通用技术通常需要互补的企业特定投资来创造价值。这些互补投资产生一种资本形式，通常是无形的，我们称之为数字资本。我们利用LinkedIn的数据创建了一个关于IT劳动力投资的扩展企业层面面板（1990-2016年）。然后，我们应用霍尔的量揭示定理来计算近几十年来数字资本的价格和数量。我们发现：1）数字资本价格随时间显著变化，在2000年互联网泡沫期间达到峰值；2）自1990年代以来积累了大量的数字资本，到我们面板数据末期，数字资本至少占企业资产的25%；3）数字资本不成比例地积累在一小部分“超级明星”企业中，其集中度远高于其他资产的集中度；4）数字资本积累可预测大约三年后的企业层面生产率。
28285.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：D24, D25, M21, O32, O33

28284.title: Self-Fulfilling Risk Panics: An Expected Utility Framework
28284.zh_title: 自我实现的恐慌：一个期望效用框架
28284.authors: Jess Benhabib, Xuewen Liu, Pengfei Wang
28284.abstract: Even if an asset has no fundamental uncertainty with a constant dividend process, a stochastic sentiment-driven equilibrium for the asset price exists besides the well-known fundamental equilibrium. Our paper constructs such sentiment-driven equilibria under general utility functions within an OLG structure. Our paper further shows that the existence of sentiment-driven equilibria is robust in a standard infinite-period model as long as the pricing kernel is affected by the asset price.
28284.zh_abstract: 即使一项资产没有基本面不确定性且具有恒定的股息过程，除了众所周知的基本面均衡外，还存在一个由情绪驱动的随机资产价格均衡。本文在代际交叠结构下，在一般效用函数下构建了这种情绪驱动均衡。本文进一步表明，只要定价核受资产价格影响，情绪驱动均衡的存在在标准无限期模型中就是稳健的。

28283.title: The Social Side of Early Human Capital Formation: Using a Field Experiment to Estimate the Causal Impact of Neighborhoods
28283.zh_title: 早期人力资本形成的社会面：利用现场实验估计邻里的因果影响
28283.authors: John A. List, Fatemeh Momeni, Yves Zenou
28283.abstract: The behavioral revolution within economics has been largely driven by psychological insights, with the sister sciences playing a lesser role. This study leverages insights from sociology to explore the role of neighborhoods on human capital formation at an early age. We do so by estimating the spillover effects from a large-scale early childhood intervention on the educational attainment of over 2,000 disadvantaged children in the United States. We document large spillover effects on both treatment and control children who live near treated children. Interestingly, the spillover effects are localized, decreasing with the spatial distance to treated neighbors. Perhaps our most novel insight is the underlying mechanisms at work: the spillover effect on non-cognitive scores operate through the child's social network while parental investment is an important channel through which cognitive spillover effects operate. Overall, our results reveal the importance of public programs and neighborhoods on human capital formation at an early age, highlighting that human capital accumulation is fundamentally a social activity.
28283.zh_abstract: 经济学中的行为革命主要由心理学见解驱动，而姊妹科学的作用较小。本研究利用社会学的见解，探索邻里在早期人力资本形成中的作用。我们通过估计一项大规模早期儿童干预对美国2000多名弱势儿童教育成就的溢出效应来实现这一点。我们记录了生活在受治疗儿童附近的治疗组和对照组儿童均受到的大规模溢出效应。有趣的是，溢出效应是局部化的，随着与受治疗邻居的空间距离增加而减弱。也许我们最新颖的见解在于其背后的机制：非认知得分的溢出效应通过儿童的社会网络运作，而父母投资是认知溢出效应运作的重要渠道。总体而言，我们的结果揭示了公共项目和邻里在早期人力资本形成中的重要性，强调人力资本积累本质上是一种社会活动。
28283.meta: Programs：CH, ED, PE；JEL：C93, I21, I24, I26, I28, R1

28282.title: Integrated Epi-Econ Assessment
28282.authors: Timo Boppart, Karl Harmenberg, John Hassler, Per Krusell, Jonna Olsson
28282.abstract: We formulate an economic time use model and add to it an epidemiological SIR block. In the event of an epidemic, households shift their leisure time from activities with a high degree of social interaction to activities with less, and also choose to work more from home. Our model highlights the different actions taken by young individuals, who are less severely affected by the disease, and by old individuals, who are more vulnerable. We calibrate our model to time use data from ATUS, employment data, epidemiological data, and estimates of the value of a statistical life. There are qualitative as well as quantitative differences between the competitive equilibrium and social planner allocation and, moreover, these depend critically on when a cure arrives. Due to the role played by social activities in people's welfare, simple indicators such as deaths and GDP are insuffcient for judging outcomes in our economy.
28282.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个经济时间使用模型，并为其添加了一个流行病学SIR模块。在流行病发生时，家庭将休闲时间从高社交互动活动转向低社交互动活动，并选择更多地在家工作。我们的模型强调了受疾病影响较轻的年轻个体与更易受影响的老年个体所采取的不同行动。我们根据美国时间使用调查（ATUS）的时间使用数据、就业数据、流行病学数据以及统计生命价值估计值对模型进行校准。竞争均衡与社会规划者配置之间存在定性和定量差异，而且这些差异关键取决于治愈方法的出现时间。由于社交活动在人们福利中扮演的角色，死亡人数和GDP等简单指标不足以判断我们经济中的结果。

28281.title: Macroeconomic Expectations and Credit Card Spending
28281.zh_title: 宏观经济预期与信用卡支出
28281.authors: Misha Galashin, Martin Kanz, Ricardo Perez-Truglia
28281.abstract: We examine how macroeconomic expectations affect consumer decisions, using an experiment with 2,872 credit card customers at a large commercial bank. In the experiment, participants are randomized into receiving expert forecasts of inflation and the nominal exchange rate. We find that forecasts significantly affect inflation and exchange rate expectations, but do not change spending or self-reported consumption plans as predicted by standard models of intertemporal choice. Results from a supplementary survey experiment suggest that consumers are sophisticated enough to anticipate nominal rigidities and reduce spending on durables for precautionary reasons, counteracting the effects predicted by standard models of intertemporal optimization.
28281.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项针对某大型商业银行2872名信用卡客户的实验，考察了宏观经济预期如何影响消费者决策。实验中，参与者被随机分配接收关于通胀和名义汇率的专家预测。我们发现，这些预测显著影响了通胀和汇率预期，但并未如标准跨期选择模型所预测的那样改变支出或自我报告的消费计划。一项补充性调查实验的结果表明，消费者足够精明，能够预见到名义刚性，并出于预防性动机减少耐用品支出，从而抵消了标准跨期优化模型所预测的效应。
28281.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：C81, C93, D83, D84, E03, E31

28280.title: Uniform Admissions, Unequal Access: Did the Top 10% Plan Increase Access to Selective Flagship Institutions?
28280.zh_title: 统一录取，不平等准入：前10%计划是否增加了进入选择性旗舰院校的机会？
28280.abstract: The Top 10% Plan admissions policy has now been in place in Texas for over two decades. We analyze 18 years of post-Top 10% Plan data to look for evidence of increased access to the selective Texas flagship campuses among all Texas high schools. We provide a detailed description of changes in enrollment patterns at the flagship campuses from Texas high schools after the implementation of the Top 10% Plan, focusing on whether the policy resulted in new sending patterns from high schools that did not have a history of sending students to the flagship campuses. Our analysis reveals an increase in the likelihood that high schools in non-suburban areas sent students to the flagship campuses, but ultimately little to no equity-producing effects of the Top 10% Plan over this 18-year period. In fact, the representation of traditional, always-sending, feeder high schools on the flagship campuses continued to dwarf the population of students from other high schools. Thus, the purported high school representation benefits of the policy appear to be overstated and may not go as far as advocates might have hoped in terms of generating equity of access to the flagship campuses in the state.
28280.zh_abstract: 得克萨斯州的“前10%计划”招生政策已实施二十余年。我们分析了该计划实施后18年的数据，以寻找所有得克萨斯州高中进入该州选择性旗舰校区机会增加的证据。我们详细描述了“前10%计划”实施后旗舰校区来自得克萨斯州高中的入学模式变化，重点关注该政策是否导致那些历史上未曾向旗舰校区输送学生的高中出现了新的输送模式。我们的分析显示，非郊区高中向旗舰校区输送学生的可能性有所增加，但最终，在这18年间，“前10%计划”几乎没有产生促进公平的效果。事实上，传统上持续输送生源的“ feeder”高中在旗舰校区的代表性，仍然远远超过其他高中的学生群体。因此，该政策所声称的高中代表性益处似乎被夸大了，并且可能远未达到倡导者所期望的在州内旗舰校区准入公平性方面的效果。
28280.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：I21, I23, I24, J18

28279.title: Why Does the U.S. Have the Best Research Universities? Incentives, Resources, and Virtuous Circles
28279.zh_title: 为什么美国拥有最好的研究型大学？激励、资源与良性循环
28279.abstract: Around 1875 the U.S. had none of the world’s leading research universities; today, it accounts for the majority of the top-ranked. Many observers cite events surrounding World War II as the source of this reversal. We present evidence that U.S. research universities had surpassed most countries’ decades before WWII. An explanation of their dominance must therefore begin earlier. The one we offer highlights reforms that began after the Civil War and enhanced the incentives and resources the system directs at research. Our story is not one of success by design, but rather of competition leading American colleges to begin to care about research. We draw on agency theory to argue that this led to increasing academic specialization, and in turn, to more precise measures of professors’ research output. Combined with sorting dynamics that concentrated talent and resources at some schools—and the emergence of tenure—this enhanced research performance.
28279.zh_abstract: 大约在1875年，美国没有一所世界领先的研究型大学；而今天，它占据了大多数顶尖大学的位置。许多观察家将二战前后的事件视为这一逆转的根源。我们提供的证据表明，美国的研究型大学在二战前几十年就已经超越了大多数国家。因此，对其主导地位的解释必须从更早开始。我们提出的解释强调了内战后开始的改革，这些改革增强了该系统用于研究的激励和资源。我们的故事并非精心设计下的成功，而是竞争导致美国大学开始关注研究。我们利用代理理论论证，这导致了学术专业化的加强，进而产生了对教授研究成果更精确的衡量标准。结合将人才和资源集中在某些学校的分类动态——以及终身教职的出现——这提升了研究绩效。
28279.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, ED, LS；JEL：I2, I23, N0

28278.title: Latent Exports: Almost Ideal Gravity and Zeros
28278.zh_title: 潜在出口：近乎理想的引力模型与零贸易流
28278.abstract: Almost Ideal gravity associates zero trade flows with variable and fixed trade cost variation in a flexible demand system. Latent trade shares between non-partners are inferred from the Tobit estimator applied to trade among 75 countries and 25 sectors in 2006. Latent Trade Bias (LTB) is the difference between the latent trade share and the as-if-frictionless trade share. Explained LTB variance decomposition shows 52% due to variation of variable trade cost, 24% due to non-homothetic income effects, and 24% due to fixed trade cost effects. Counterfactual variable (fixed) cost reductions suggest cases of successful export promotion between non-partners.
28278.zh_abstract: 近乎理想的引力模型将零贸易流与一个灵活需求系统中的可变和固定贸易成本变化联系起来。通过将Tobit估计量应用于2006年75个国家和25个部门之间的贸易数据，推断出非贸易伙伴之间的潜在贸易份额。潜在贸易偏差（LTB）是潜在贸易份额与无摩擦贸易份额之间的差值。对LTB方差的分解显示，52%归因于可变贸易成本的变化，24%归因于非齐次收入效应，24%归因于固定贸易成本效应。反事实的可变（固定）成本降低表明，在非贸易伙伴之间存在成功的出口促进案例。

28277.title: Pound for Pound Export Diversification
28277.zh_title: 等量齐观的出口多样化
28277.authors: James E. Anderson, Yoto V. Yotov
28277.abstract: We propose a short-run model of the extensive margin of trade and deploy it to distinguish and quantify domestic and cross-border margins. Our empirical focus is on the domestic extensive margin of trade (domestic distribution of a product) and its importance for quantifying policy and globalization effects on the international extensive margin of trade. We build a dataset that combines data on the domestic extensive margin and the standard international extensive margin. It reveals significant and intuitive variation in the domestic extensive margin across countries and over time. We quantify the extensive margin effects of European Union (EU) integration, 2008-2018, and demonstrate that these effects cannot be identified without the domestic extensive margin. We find strong and highly heterogeneous effects, both across countries and directionally.
28277.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个贸易扩展边际的短期模型，并运用它来区分和量化国内和跨境边际。我们的实证重点是贸易的国内扩展边际（产品在国内的分布）及其对于量化政策和全球化对国际贸易扩展边际影响的重要性。我们构建了一个结合国内扩展边际数据和标准国际扩展边际数据的数据集。该数据集揭示了各国之间以及随时间变化的国内扩展边际存在显著且直观的差异。我们量化了2008-2018年欧盟一体化对扩展边际的影响，并证明如果没有国内扩展边际，这些影响是无法识别的。我们发现，无论是在国家之间还是在方向上，都存在强烈且高度异质的影响。

28276.title: Informal Central Bank Communication
28276.abstract: Starting from a set of facts on the timing of stock returns relative to Federal Reserve decision-making, I argue that informal communication – including unattributed communication -- plays a central role in monetary policy communication. This contrasts with the standard communications framework in which communication should be public and on-the-record because it serves to ensure accountability and policy effectiveness. I lay out possible benefits of using unattributed communication as an institution, but these should be weighed against substantial costs: It runs counter to accountability to use unattributed communication, causes frustration among those trying to understand central bank intensions, and enables use of such communication by individual policymakers. Unattributed communication driven by policymaker disagreements is unambiguously welfare reducing, because it reduces policy flexibility and harms the central bank’s credibility and decision-making process. Central banks may benefit from resisting unattributed communication via expensive newsletters and increasing consensus-building efforts to reduce disagreement-driven unattributed communication.
28276.zh_abstract: 从一组关于股票回报时间相对于美联储决策时间的事实出发，我认为非正式沟通——包括不具名沟通——在货币政策沟通中扮演着核心角色。这与标准的沟通框架形成对比，在该框架中，沟通应该是公开且记录在案的，因为它有助于确保问责制和政策的有效性。我阐述了将不具名沟通作为一种制度可能带来的好处，但这些好处应与巨大的成本相权衡：使用不具名沟通有悖于问责制，会导致那些试图理解央行意图的人感到困惑，并使得个别政策制定者能够利用这种沟通。由政策制定者分歧驱动的非具名沟通明确地降低了福利，因为它降低了政策灵活性，并损害了央行的信誉和决策过程。央行或许可以通过抵制昂贵的新闻通讯中的不具名沟通，并加强建立共识的努力，以减少由分歧驱动的非具名沟通，从而从中受益。

28275.title: Effects of Reduced Workplace Presence on COVID-19 Deaths: An Instrumental-Variables Approach.
28275.zh_title: 减少工作场所出勤对COVID-19死亡的影响：一个工具变量方法
28275.abstract: Numerous government policies have attempted to keep workers out of the workplace, on the assumption that this will lower transmission of COVID-19. We test that assumption, measuring the effect of aggregate workplace absence on US COVID deaths at the county level through August. Instrumenting with an index of how many local workers pre-pandemic can work from home, based on differences in county occupational mix, we find no effect of workplace absence until mid-May, then a sharply rising effect. By August, moving 10 percent of a county's workers from the workplace would lower deaths there by three quarters one month later.
28275.zh_abstract: 许多政府政策试图让工人远离工作场所，其假设是这将降低COVID-19的传播。我们检验了这一假设，通过工具变量方法衡量了截至8月份县级层面总体工作场所缺勤对美国COVID-19死亡人数的影响。我们使用一个基于疫情前当地工人可居家办公比例的指数作为工具变量，该指数基于县级职业构成的差异。我们发现，直到5月中旬，工作场所缺勤没有影响，之后影响急剧上升。到8月份，将一个县10%的工人从工作场所转移出去，会使一个月后的死亡人数减少四分之三。

28274.title: Specialization, Market Access and Real Income
28274.zh_title: 专业化、市场准入与实际收入
28274.authors: Dominick Bartelme, Ting Lan, Andrei A. Levchenko
28274.abstract: This paper estimates the impact of external demand shocks on real income. Our empirical strategy is based on a first order approximation to a wide class of small open economy models that feature sector-level gravity in trade flows. The framework allows us to measure foreign shocks and characterize their impact on income in terms of reduced-form elasticities. We use machine learning techniques to group 4-digit manufacturing sectors into a smaller number of clusters, and show that the cluster-level elasticities of income with respect to foreign shocks can be estimated using high-dimensional statistical techniques. We find clear evidence of heterogeneity in the income responses to different foreign shocks. Foreign demand shocks in complex intermediate and capital goods have large positive impacts on real income, whereas impacts in other sectors are negligible. The estimates imply that the pattern of sectoral specialization plays a quantitatively large role in how foreign shocks affect real income, while geographic position plays a smaller role. Finally, a calibrated multi-sector production and trade model can rationalize both the average and the heterogeneity in real income elasticities to foreign shocks under reasonable values of structural parameters.
28274.zh_abstract: 本文估计了外部需求冲击对实际收入的影响。我们的实证策略基于对一大类具有部门层面贸易引力特征的小型开放经济模型的一阶近似。该框架使我们能够衡量外国冲击，并以其对收入的简化形式弹性来刻画其影响。我们使用机器学习技术将4位数制造业部门分组为更少的集群，并表明集群层面收入对外国冲击的弹性可以使用高维统计技术进行估计。我们发现了收入对不同外国冲击的反应存在异质性的明确证据。复杂中间品和资本品的外国需求冲击对实际收入有较大的正向影响，而其他部门的影响则可以忽略不计。这些估计表明，部门专业化模式在外国冲击如何影响实际收入方面起着数量上较大的作用，而地理位置的作用较小。最后，一个校准后的多部门生产和贸易模型可以在合理的结构参数值下，合理化实际收入对外国冲击弹性的平均值和异质性。

28273.title: Identifying the Latent Space Geometry of Network Models through Analysis of Curvature
28273.zh_title: 通过曲率分析识别网络模型的潜在空间几何结构
28273.authors: Shane Lubold, Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Tyler H. McCormick
28273.abstract: Statistically modeling networks, across numerous disciplines and contexts, is fundamentally challenging because of (often high-order) dependence between connections. A common approach assigns each person in the graph to a position on a low-dimensional manifold. Distance between individuals in this (latent) space is inversely proportional to the likelihood of forming a connection. The choice of the latent geometry (the manifold class, dimension, and curvature) has consequential impacts on the substantive conclusions of the model. More positive curvature in the manifold, for example, encourages more and tighter communities; negative curvature induces repulsion among nodes. Currently, however, the choice of the latent geometry is an a priori modeling assumption and there is limited guidance about how to make these choices in a data-driven way. In this work, we present a method to consistently estimate the manifold type, dimension, and curvature from an empirically relevant class of latent spaces: simply connected, complete Riemannian manifolds of constant curvature. Our core insight comes by representing the graph as a noisy distance matrix based on the ties between cliques. Leveraging results from statistical geometry, we develop hypothesis tests to determine whether the observed distances could plausibly be embedded isometrically in each of the candidate geometries. We explore the accuracy of our approach with simulations and then apply our approach to data-sets from economics and sociology as well as neuroscience.
28273.zh_abstract: 由于连接之间通常存在高阶依赖关系，对网络进行统计建模在众多学科和情境中都是根本性的挑战。一种常见方法是将图中的每个个体分配到一个低维流形上的某个位置。个体在此潜在空间中的距离与形成连接的可能性成反比。潜在几何结构（流形类别、维度和曲率）的选择会对模型的实质性结论产生重要影响。例如，流形上更正的曲率会鼓励更多且更紧密的社群；负曲率则会在节点间引发排斥。然而，目前潜在几何结构的选择是一个先验的建模假设，关于如何以数据驱动的方式做出这些选择的指导十分有限。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种方法，能够从一类经验相关的潜在空间——即常曲率的单连通完备黎曼流形——中一致地估计流形类型、维度和曲率。我们的核心洞见来自于将图表示为基于团之间联系的带噪声距离矩阵。利用统计几何的结果，我们开发了假设检验，以确定观测到的距离是否可能等距嵌入到每个候选几何结构中。我们通过模拟探索了方法的准确性，然后将该方法应用于来自经济学、社会学以及神经科学的数据集。
28273.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, ITI, LS, POL, PR, TWP；JEL：C01, C12, C4, C52, C6, D85, L14

28272.title: Dynamic Price Competition, Learning-By-Doing and Strategic Buyers
28272.zh_title: 动态价格竞争、干中学与策略性买家
28272.authors: Andrew Sweeting, Dun Jia, Shen Hui, Xinlu Yao
28272.abstract: We generalize recent models of dynamic price competition where sellers benefit from learning-by-doing by allowing for long-lived strategic buyers, with a single parameter capturing the extent to which each buyer internalizes future buyer surplus. Many of the equilibria that exist when buyers are atomistic or myopic are eliminated when buyers internalize even a modest share of their effects on future surplus. The equilibria that survive tend to be those where long-run market competition is preserved.
28272.zh_abstract: 我们将近期关于卖家从干中学中受益的动态价格竞争模型进行了推广，允许存在长期存活的策略性买家，并通过一个单一参数来刻画每个买家在多大程度上内化未来的买家剩余。当买家是原子式的或短视时存在的许多均衡，在买家即使内化其对未来剩余影响的适度份额时也会被消除。幸存下来的均衡往往是那些长期市场竞争得以维持的均衡。

28271.title: Gentrification and Retail Churn: Theory and Evidence
28271.zh_title: 绅士化与零售更替：理论与证据
28271.authors: Edward L. Glaeser, Michael Luca, Erica Moszkowski
28271.abstract: How does gentrification transform neighborhood retail amenities? This paper presents a model in which gentrification harms incumbent resident by increasing rental costs and by eliminating distinctive local stores. While rising rents can be offset with targeted transfers, the destruction of neighborhood character can – in principle – reduce overall social surplus. Empirically we find that gentrifying neighborhoods experience faster growth in both the number of retail establishments and business closure rates than their non-gentrifying counterparts. However, we see little evidence that gentrification is associated with changes in retail mix or prices – suggesting limited welfare losses.
28271.zh_abstract: 绅士化如何改变社区零售设施？本文提出了一个模型，在该模型中，绅士化通过增加租金成本和消除特色本地商店来损害现有居民的利益。虽然租金上涨可以通过有针对性的转移支付来抵消，但社区特色的破坏原则上可能会减少总体社会剩余。实证上，我们发现，与非绅士化社区相比，绅士化社区的零售机构数量增长更快，企业关闭率也更高。然而，我们几乎没有发现证据表明绅士化与零售组合或价格的变化相关——这表明福利损失有限。

28270.title: Religion and Educational Mobility in Africa
28270.zh_title: 非洲的宗教与教育流动性
28270.authors: Alberto Alesina, Sebastian Hohmann, Stelios Michalopoulos, Elias Papaioannou
28270.abstract: This paper offers a comprehensive account of the intergenerational transmission of education across religious groups in Africa, home to some of the world’s largest Christian and Muslim communities. First, we use census data from 20 countries to construct new upward and downward religion-specific intergenerational mobility (IM) statistics. Christian boys and girls have much higher upward and lower downward mobility than Muslims and Animists. Muslims perform well only in a handful of countries where they are small minorities. Second, we trace the roots of these disparities. Although family structures differ across faiths, this variation explains only a small fraction of the observed IM inequities (roughly 12%). Inter-religious differences in occupational specialization and urban residence do not play any role. In contrast, regional features explain nearly half of the imbalances in educational mobility. Third, we isolate the causal impact of regions from spatial sorting exploiting information on children whose households moved when they were at different ages during childhood. Irrespective of the religious identity, regional exposure effects are present for all children moving before 12. Fourth, we map and characterize the religious IM gaps across thousands of African regions. Among numerous regional geographic, economic, and historical features, the district's Muslim share is the most important correlate. Children adhering to Islam underperform Christians in areas with substantial Muslim communities. Fifth, survey data reveal that Muslims display stronger in-group preferences and place a lower valuation on education. Our findings call for more research on the origins of religious segregation and the role of religion-specific, institutional, and social conventions on education and opportunity.
28270.zh_abstract: 本文全面阐述了非洲（世界上一些最大的基督教和穆斯林社区所在地）各宗教群体间教育的代际传递。首先，我们利用20个国家的普查数据，构建了新的向上和向下的宗教特定代际流动性统计指标。基督教男孩和女孩的向上流动性远高于穆斯林和万物有灵论者，而向下流动性则远低于他们。穆斯林仅在少数他们属于少数群体的国家表现良好。其次，我们追溯了这些差异的根源。尽管不同信仰的家庭结构存在差异，但这种差异仅能解释所观察到的代际流动性不平等的一小部分（约12%）。宗教间在职业专业化和城市居住方面的差异不起任何作用。相比之下，区域特征解释了教育流动性不平衡的近一半。第三，我们利用在童年不同年龄段随家庭迁移的儿童信息，将区域的因果影响与空间分类隔离开来。无论宗教身份如何，所有在12岁前迁移的儿童都存在区域暴露效应。第四，我们绘制并描述了非洲数千个地区宗教代际流动性差距的特征。在众多区域地理、经济和历史特征中，该地区的穆斯林比例是最重要的相关因素。在穆斯林社区规模较大的地区，信奉伊斯兰教的儿童表现不如基督徒。第五，调查数据显示，穆斯林表现出更强的内群体偏好，并且对教育的重视程度较低。我们的发现呼吁对宗教隔离的起源以及宗教特定的制度和社会习俗对教育和机会的作用进行更多研究。
28270.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EFG, POL；JEL：N0, N37, O0, O1, O15, O55, Z12

28269.title: Who Benefits from Worker Representation on Corporate Boards?
28269.zh_title: 谁从工人进入公司董事会中受益？
28269.authors: Christine Blandhol, Magne Mogstad, Peter Nilsson, Ola L. Vestad
28269.abstract: We study a size-contingent law in Norway that grants workers the right to board representation in firms with 30 or more employees. To analyze the impact of the law, we embed the regulation into an equilibrium model of the labor market. We show how to use behavioral responses to the regulation to identify (i) the direct effects of the policy on regulated firms and workers, (ii) the distortions from firms adjusting their size to avoid the regulation, and (iii) the equilibrium effects in the labor market. We evaluate these effects on firm profits and production, as well as on worker compensation, including both wages and non-wage amenities.
28269.zh_abstract: 我们研究了挪威一项基于公司规模的法律，该法律赋予员工人数达到或超过30人的公司的工人进入董事会的权利。为了分析该法律的影响，我们将该法规嵌入到一个劳动力市场均衡模型中。我们展示了如何利用对该法规的行为反应来识别：(i) 该政策对受监管公司和工人的直接影响，(ii) 公司为避免监管而调整规模所产生的扭曲，以及 (iii) 劳动力市场中的均衡效应。我们评估了这些效应对公司利润和生产的影响，以及对工人薪酬（包括工资和非工资福利）的影响。
28269.meta: Programs：CF, LS；JEL：G34, G38, J31, J54, J58

28268.title: Prep School for Poor Kids: The Long-Run Impacts of Head Start on Human Capital and Economic Self-Sufficiency
28268.zh_title: 贫困儿童的预备学校：启蒙计划对人力资本和经济自给自足的长期影响
28268.authors: Martha J. Bailey, Shuqiao Sun, Brenden D. Timpe
28268.abstract: This paper evaluates the long-run effects of Head Start using large-scale, restricted 2000-2018 Census-ACS data linked to the SSA’s Numident file, which contains exact date and county of birth. Using the county rollout of Head Start between 1965 and 1980 and age-eligibility cutoffs for school entry, we find that Head Start generated large increases in adult human capital and economic self-sufficiency, including a 0.65-year increase in schooling, a 2.7-percent increase in high-school completion, an 8.5-percent increase in college enrollment, and a 39-percent increase in college completion. These estimates imply sizable, long-term returns to public investments in large-scale preschool programs.
28268.zh_abstract: 本文利用链接到社会保障局Numident档案的大规模、受限的2000-2018年人口普查-美国社区调查数据，评估了启蒙计划的长期效应，该数据包含确切的出生日期和县。利用1965年至1980年间启蒙计划在各县的推广以及入学年龄资格截止点，我们发现启蒙计划显著提高了成年后的人力资本和经济自给自足水平，包括受教育年限增加0.65年，高中毕业率提高2.7%，大学入学率提高8.5%，以及大学毕业率提高39%。这些估计表明，对大规模学前教育项目的公共投资能带来可观的长期回报。
28268.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I2, I24, J6

28267.title: Information, Preferences, and Household Demand for School Value Added
28267.zh_title: 信息、偏好与家庭对学校增值的需求
28267.authors: Robert Ainsworth, Rajeev Dehejia, Cristian Pop-Eleches, Miguel Urquiola
28267.abstract: This paper examines the roles that information and preferences play in determining whether households choose schools with high value added. We study Romanian school markets using administrative data, a survey, and an experiment. The administrative data show that, on average, households could select schools with 1 s.d. worth of additional value added. This may reflect that households have incorrect beliefs about schools’ value added, or that their preferences lead them to prioritize other school traits. We elicit households’ beliefs and find that they explain less than a fifth of the variation in value added. We then inform randomly selected households about the value added of the schools in their towns. This improves the accuracy of households’ beliefs and leads low-achieving students to attend higher-value added schools. We next estimate households’ preferences and predict their choices under the counterfactual of fully accurate beliefs. We find that beliefs account for 18 (11) percent of the value added that households with low- (high-) achieving children leave unexploited. Interestingly, for households with low-achieving children, the experiment seems to have affected both beliefs and preferences. This generates larger effects on choices than would be predicted via impacts on beliefs alone.
28267.zh_abstract: 本文考察了信息和偏好在决定家庭是否选择高增值学校中所起的作用。我们利用行政数据、一项调查和一个实验来研究罗马尼亚的学校市场。行政数据显示，平均而言，家庭本可以选择增值高出1个标准差的学校。这可能反映出家庭对学校增值存在错误信念，或者他们的偏好导致他们优先考虑学校的其他特征。我们获取了家庭的信念，发现它们只能解释增值差异的五分之一不到。随后，我们向随机选择的家庭告知其所在城镇学校的增值信息。这提高了家庭信念的准确性，并导致低成就学生就读于增值更高的学校。接着，我们估计了家庭的偏好，并预测了在完全准确信念的反事实情况下他们的选择。我们发现，信念解释了低成就（高成就）子女家庭未利用的增值的18%（11%）。有趣的是，对于有低成就子女的家庭，实验似乎同时影响了信念和偏好。这产生了比仅通过信念影响所预测的更大的选择效应。

28266.title: Supply-Side Variation in the Use of Emergency Departments
28266.zh_title: 急诊科使用的供给侧差异
28266.authors: Dan Zeltzer, Liran Einav, Avichai Chasid, Ran D. Balicer
28266.abstract: We study the role of person-specific and place-specific factors in explaining geographic variation in emergency department (ED) utilization using detailed data on 150,000 patients who moved regions within Israel. We document that about half of the destination-origin differences in the average ED utilization rate across districts translates to the change (up or down) in movers’ propensity to visit the ED. In contrast, we find no change in the probability of having an unplanned hospital admission (that is, via the ED), implying that the entire change in ED use by movers is driven by ED visits that do not lead to hospital admission. Similar results are obtained in a complementary event study, which uses hospital entry as a source of variation. The results from both approaches suggest that supply-side variation in ED access affects only the less severe cases—for which close substitutes likely exist—and that variation across ED physicians in their propensity to admit patients is not explained by place-specific factors, such as differences in incentives, capacity, or diagnostic quality.
28266.zh_abstract: 我们利用在以色列各地区间迁移的15万名患者的详细数据，研究了个体特定因素和地方特定因素在解释急诊科使用率地理差异中的作用。我们记录到，各地区间平均急诊科使用率的差异中，约有一半会转化为迁移者就诊倾向的变化（上升或下降）。相比之下，我们发现迁移者发生非计划住院（即通过急诊科入院）的概率没有变化，这意味着迁移者急诊科使用的全部变化是由未导致住院的急诊科就诊驱动的。在另一项利用医院进入作为变异来源的补充事件研究中，得到了类似的结果。两种方法的结果都表明，急诊科可及性的供给侧差异仅影响较不严重的病例——这些病例可能存在相近的替代选择——并且急诊科医生收治患者倾向的差异不能由地方特定因素（如激励、容量或诊断质量的差异）来解释。

28265.title: What Were the Odds? Estimating the Market's Probability of Uncertain Events
28265.zh_title: 概率几何？估计市场对不确定事件的概率
28265.abstract: An event study generates only a lower bound on the full effect of an event unless researchers know the probability that investors assigned to the event before it occurred. We develop two model-free methods for recovering the market’s priced-in probability of events. These methods require running event studies in financial options to complement the standard event study in stock prices. Validating both approaches, we estimate that the 2016 U.S. election outcome had a 12% chance of occurring. This probability is consistent with contemporary polling, bookmaker, and prediction market estimates. Demonstrating the usefulness of our approaches, we show that many OPEC meetings’ outcomes were well-anticipated. OPEC retained substantial influence on world oil prices even as the U.S. increased oil production.
28265.zh_abstract: 除非研究者知道投资者在事件发生前赋予该事件的概率，否则事件研究只能得出事件全部效应的下限。我们开发了两种无模型方法，用于恢复市场定价中包含的事件概率。这些方法需要在金融期权中进行事件研究，以补充股票价格中的标准事件研究。验证这两种方法后，我们估计2016年美国大选结果发生的概率为12%。这一概率与当时的民调、博彩公司和预测市场的估计一致。为展示我们方法的实用性，我们表明许多欧佩克会议的结果被很好地预期了。即使在美国增加石油产量的情况下，欧佩克仍对世界石油价格保持重大影响。

28264.title: When the Great Equalizer Shuts Down: Schools, Peers, and Parents in Pandemic Times
28264.zh_title: 当伟大均衡器关闭时：疫情时期的学校、同伴与家长
28264.authors: Francesco Agostinelli, Matthias Doepke, Giuseppe Sorrenti, Fabrizio Zilibotti
28264.abstract: What are the effects of school closures during the Covid-19 pandemic on children's education? Online education is an imperfect substitute for in-person learning, particularly for children from low-income families. Peer effects also change: schools allow children from different socio-economic backgrounds to mix together, and this effect is lost when schools are closed. Another factor is the response of parents, some of whom compensate for the changed environment through their own efforts, while others are unable to do so. We examine the interaction of these factors with the aid of a structural model of skill formation. We find that school closures have a large and persistent effect on educational outcomes that is highly unequal. High school students from poor neighborhoods suffer a learning loss of 0.4 standard deviations, whereas children from rich neighborhoods remain unscathed. The channels operating through schools, peers, and parents all contribute to growing educational inequality during the pandemic.
28264.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情期间学校关闭对儿童教育有何影响？在线教育是对面对面学习的不完美替代，尤其对于低收入家庭的儿童。同伴效应也发生变化：学校让不同社会经济背景的儿童融合在一起，而学校关闭时这种效应消失。另一个因素是家长的反应，一些人通过自身努力补偿环境变化，而另一些人则无法做到。我们借助技能形成的结构模型考察这些因素的相互作用。我们发现学校关闭对教育成果产生巨大且持久的影响，且这种影响高度不平等。来自贫困社区的高中生遭受0.4个标准差的学习损失，而来自富裕社区的儿童则未受影响。通过学校、同伴和家长发挥作用的渠道都加剧了疫情期间教育不平等。

28263.title: International Trade and Earnings Inequality: A New Factor Content Approach
28263.zh_title: 国际贸易与收入不平等：一种新的要素含量方法
28263.authors: Rodrigo Adão, Paul Carrillo, Arnaud Costinot, Dave Donaldson, Dina Pomeranz
28263.abstract: We develop a new factor content approach to study the impact of trade on inequality. Our analysis generalizes the theoretical results of Deardorff and Staiger (1988) and improves on past empirical implementations of these results. Combined with unique administrative data from Ecuador, our approach yields measures of individual-level exposure to exports and imports, for both capital and labor income, as well as estimates of the incidence of such exposure across the income distribution. We find that international trade raises earnings inequality in Ecuador, especially in the upper-half of the income distribution. However, the drop in inequality experienced by Ecuador over the last decade would have been less pronounced in the absence of trade.
28263.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种新的要素含量方法来研究贸易对不平等的影响。我们的分析推广了Deardorff和Staiger（1988）的理论结果，并改进了过去对这些结果的实证实施。结合厄瓜多尔的独特行政数据，我们的方法得出了个人层面在出口和进口中的暴露程度指标，涵盖资本和劳动收入，以及这种暴露在收入分布中的影响估计。我们发现国际贸易提高了厄瓜多尔的收入不平等，尤其是在收入分布的上半部分。然而，如果没有贸易，厄瓜多尔过去十年经历的不平等下降将不那么显著。
28263.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, LS；JEL：D3, F1, F6, J2

28262.title: Consumer Protection for Financial Inclusion in Low and Middle Income Countries: Bridging Regulator and Academic Perspectives
28262.zh_title: 中低收入国家金融包容性的消费者保护：弥合监管者与学术界的视角
28262.authors: Seth Garz, Xavier Giné, Dean Karlan, Rafe Mazer, Caitlin Sanford, Jonathan Zinman
28262.abstract: Markets for consumer financial services are growing rapidly in low and middle income countries and being transformed by digital technologies and platforms. With growth and change come concerns about protecting consumers from firm exploitation due to imperfect information and contracting as well as from their own decision-making limitations. We seek to bridge regulator and academic perspectives on these underlying sources of harm and five potential problems that can result: high and hidden prices, overindebtedness, post-contract exploitation, fraud, and discrimination. These potential problems span product markets old and new, and could impact micro- and macroeconomies alike. Yet there is little consensus on how to define, diagnose, or treat them. Evidence-based consumer financial protection will require substantial advances in theory and especially empirics, and we outline key areas for future research.
28262.zh_abstract: 中低收入国家的消费者金融服务市场正在快速增长，并受到数字技术和平台的变革。随着增长和变化，人们担忧消费者因信息不完善和合同问题以及自身决策局限性而受到企业剥削。我们试图弥合监管者和学术界对这些潜在危害来源以及可能导致的五个问题的看法：高且隐藏的价格、过度负债、合同后剥削、欺诈和歧视。这些潜在问题跨越新旧产品市场，并可能影响微观和宏观经济。然而，对于如何定义、诊断或处理这些问题几乎没有共识。基于证据的消费者金融保护需要理论和尤其是实证方面的重大进展，我们概述了未来研究的关键领域。
28262.meta: Programs：DEV, LE, LS, PE；JEL：D11, D12, D18, D81, D82, D83, D9, G21, K23, K31, K42, O12

28261.title: Self-Fulfilling Prophecies, Quasi Non-Ergodicity & Wealth Inequality
28261.zh_title: 自我实现的预言、准非遍历性与财富不平等
28261.abstract: We construct a model of an exchange economy in which agents trade assets contingent on an observable signal, the probability of which depends on public opinion. The agents in our model are replaced occasionally and each person updates beliefs in response to observed outcomes. We show that the distribution of the observed signal is described by a quasi-non-ergodic process and that people continue to disagree with each other forever. These disagreements generate large wealth inequalities that arise from the multiplicative nature of wealth dynamics which make successful bold bets highly profitable.
28261.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个交换经济模型，其中代理人交易依赖于可观测信号的资产，该信号的概率取决于公众舆论。我们模型中的代理人偶尔被替换，每个人根据观察到的结果更新信念。我们表明，可观测信号的分布由准非遍历过程描述，并且人们会永远持续地相互分歧。这些分歧产生了巨大的财富不平等，这种不平等源于财富动态的乘数性质，使得成功的激进押注高度有利可图。

28260.title: Pricing Currency Risks
28260.authors: Mikhail Chernov, Magnus Dahlquist, Lars A. Lochstoer
28260.abstract: The currency market features a relatively small cross-section and conditional expected returns can be characterized by only a few signals – interest differentials, trend, and mean-reversion. We exploit these properties to construct a conditional projection of the stochastic discount factor onto excess returns of individual currencies. Our approach is implementable in real time and prices all currencies and prominent strategies conditionally as well as unconditionally. We document that the fraction of unpriced risk in these assets is at least 85%. Extant explanations of carry strategies based on intermediary capital or global volatility are related to these unpriced components, while consumption growth is related to the priced component of returns.
28260.zh_abstract: 货币市场具有相对较小的横截面，条件期望收益仅可由少数信号刻画——利率差异、趋势和均值回归。我们利用这些性质构建了随机贴现因子对单个货币超额收益的条件投影。我们的方法可实时实施，并在条件和非条件情况下对所有货币和显著策略进行定价。我们记录到这些资产中未定价风险的比例至少为85%。基于中介资本或全球波动性的利差交易策略的现有解释与这些未定价成分相关，而消费增长则与回报的定价成分相关。

28259.title: Business-Level Expectations and Uncertainty
28259.zh_title: 企业层面的预期与不确定性
28259.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Lucia Foster, Brian Lucking, Scott Ohlmacher, Itay Saporta-Eksten
28259.abstract: The Census Bureau’s 2015 Management and Organizational Practices Survey (MOPS) utilized innovative methodology to collect five-point forecast distributions over own future shipments, employment, and capital and materials expenditures for 35,000 U.S. manufacturing plants. First and second moments of these plant-level forecast distributions covary strongly with first and second moments, respectively, of historical outcomes. The first moment of the distribution provides a measure of business’ expectations for future outcomes, while the second moment provides a measure of business’ subjective uncertainty over those outcomes. This subjective uncertainty measure correlates positively with financial risk measures. Drawing on the Annual Survey of Manufactures and the Census of Manufactures for the corresponding realizations, we find that subjective expectations are highly predictive of actual outcomes and, in fact, more predictive than statistical models fit to historical data. When respondents express greater subjective uncertainty about future outcomes at their plants, their forecasts are less accurate. However, managers supply overly precise forecast distributions in that implied confidence intervals for sales growth rates are much narrower than the distribution of actual outcomes. Finally, we develop evidence that greater use of predictive computing and structured management practices at the plant and a more decentralized decision-making process (across plants in the same firm) are associated with better forecast accuracy.
28259.zh_abstract: 美国人口普查局2015年管理与组织实践调查（MOPS）采用创新方法，收集了35000家美国制造企业关于自身未来出货量、就业、资本和材料支出的五点预测分布。这些企业层面预测分布的一阶矩和二阶矩分别与历史结果的一阶矩和二阶矩强相关。分布的一阶矩提供了企业对未来结果的预期度量，而二阶矩提供了企业对这些结果的主观不确定性度量。这种主观不确定性度量与金融风险度量正相关。利用年度制造业调查和制造业普查的相应实现值，我们发现主观预期对实际结果具有高度预测性，实际上比基于历史数据拟合的统计模型更具预测性。当受访者对其工厂未来结果表达更大的主观不确定性时，他们的预测准确性较低。然而，管理者提供的预测分布过于精确，因为销售增长率的隐含置信区间比实际结果分布窄得多。最后，我们发展证据表明，在工厂层面更多地使用预测计算和结构化管理实践，以及（同一公司内跨工厂的）更分散的决策过程，与更好的预测准确性相关。
28259.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO, PR；JEL：L2, M2, O32, O33

28258.title: Supply Shocks in a Heterogeneous-Firm New Keynesian Model: The Entry Multiplier
28258.zh_title: 供给中断的总需求放大：进入-退出乘数
28258.authors: Florin O. Bilbiie, Marc J. Melitz
28258.abstract: Due to its impact on nominal firm profits, price rigidity amplifies the response of entry and exit to adverse supply shocks, such as COVID-19. This “entry-exit multiplier” triggers substantial magnification of the welfare losses due to negative supply shocks—especially when wages are also rigid. This is in stark contrast to the benchmark New Keynesian model (NK), which predicts a positive output gap in response to that same shock under the same monetary policy. Endogenous entry-exit thus radically changes the consequences of nominal rigidities. In addition to the aggregate-demand amplification of supply disruptions, our model also reconciles the response of hours worked across the NK and RBC models. And unlike the standard NK model, our model can also be used to evaluate how monetary expansions can alleviate or even eliminate the negative output gap induced by supply disruptions.
28258.zh_abstract: 由于对名义企业利润的影响，价格刚性放大了企业进入和退出对不利供给冲击（如COVID-19）的反应。这种“进入-退出乘数”引发了负供给冲击福利损失的大幅放大——尤其是当工资也刚性的情况下。这与基准新凯恩斯模型形成鲜明对比，后者在相同货币政策下预测相同冲击会导致正产出缺口。因此，内生进入-退出从根本上改变了名义刚性的后果。除了供给中断的总需求放大外，我们的模型还协调了新凯恩斯模型和真实商业周期模型中工作时间的反应。与标准新凯恩斯模型不同，我们的模型还可用于评估货币扩张如何缓解甚至消除由供给冲击引起的负产出缺口。

28257.title: AI and Jobs: Evidence from Online Vacancies
28257.zh_title: 人工智能与就业：来自在线招聘的证据
28257.authors: Daron Acemoglu, David Autor, Jonathon Hazell, Pascual Restrepo
28257.abstract: We study the impact of AI on labor markets using establishment-level data on vacancies with detailed occupation and skill information comprising the near-universe of online vacancies in the US from 2010 onwards. There is rapid growth in AI related vacancies over 2010-2018 that is greater in AI-exposed establishments. AI-exposed establishments are reducing hiring in non-AI positions. We find no discernible relationship between AI exposure and employment or wage growth at the occupation or industry level, however, implying that AI is currently substituting for humans in a subset of tasks but it is not yet having detectable aggregate labor market consequences.
28257.zh_abstract: 我们利用包含详细职业和技能信息的企业层面招聘数据，研究了人工智能对劳动力市场的影响。该数据集涵盖了2010年以来美国几乎全部的在线招聘信息。2010年至2018年间，与人工智能相关的招聘岗位快速增长，且在人工智能渗透度较高的企业中增长更为显著。这些人工智能渗透度较高的企业正在减少非人工智能岗位的招聘。然而，我们在职业或行业层面并未发现人工智能渗透度与就业或工资增长之间存在明显关联。这意味着，人工智能目前正在替代人类完成部分任务，但尚未产生可察觉的总体劳动力市场影响。

28256.title: Public and Private Options in Practice: The Military Health System
28256.zh_title: 实践中的公共与私人选择：军事医疗体系
28256.authors: Michael D. Frakes, Jonathan Gruber, Timothy Justicz
28256.abstract: Recent debates over health care reform, including in the context of the Military Health System (MHS) and Veterans Health Administration, highlight the dispute between public and private provision of health care services. Using novel data on childbirth claims from the MHS and drawing on the combination of plausibly exogenous patient moves and heterogeneity across bases in the availability of base hospitals, we identify the impact of receiving obstetrical care on versus off military bases. We find evidence that off-base care is associated with slightly greater resource intensity, but also notably better outcomes, suggesting marginal efficiency gains from care privatization.
28256.zh_abstract: 近期关于医疗改革的辩论，包括围绕军事医疗体系和退伍军人健康管理局的讨论，凸显了公共与私人提供医疗服务之间的争议。我们利用军事医疗体系中关于分娩索赔的新数据，并结合患者看似外生的迁移以及不同基地在基地医院可用性上的差异，识别了在军事基地内与基地外接受产科护理的影响。我们发现，基地外护理与略高的资源密集度相关，但也与显著更好的结果相关，这表明医疗私有化带来了边际效率提升。
28256.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：H1, H51, I18

28255.title: Are We Spending Enough on Teachers in the U.S.?
28255.zh_title: 美国在教师上的投入是否足够？
28255.authors: Patrick Bayer, Peter Q. Blair, Kenneth Whaley
28255.abstract: Expenditures on teacher salaries in US public schools exceeds $\$200$ billion annually, yet there is no existing evidence on whether this spending level is efficient. We fill this gap by developing a theoretical test for efficiency based on the causal impact of salary spending and taxes on local house prices. We empirically implement the test on a national sample of school districts from 1990-2015, using a research design that generates quasi-random variation in public school spending and taxes. We find that a tax-funded increase in salary spending would raise house prices, indicating that spending on teacher salaries is inefficiently low.
28255.zh_abstract: 美国公立学校在教师薪资上的年度支出超过2000亿美元，但目前尚无证据表明这一支出水平是否有效。我们通过构建一个基于薪资支出和税收对当地房价因果影响的理论效率检验来填补这一空白。我们利用一个能产生公共学校支出和税收准随机变化的研究设计，对1990年至2015年间全国范围内的学区样本进行了实证检验。我们发现，由税收资助的薪资支出增加会推高房价，这表明当前对教师薪资的支出水平过低，效率不足。
28255.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ED, IO, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H41, I22, I24

28254.title: Optimal Default Options
28254.authors: B. Douglas Bernheim, Jonas Mueller Gastell
28254.abstract: Previous studies of optimal default options demonstrate that either opt-out minimization or maximization is optimal under restrictive conditions. We obtain a general characterization of the solution by studying optimal defaults when one of the problem's parameters approaches a limiting value. We interpret these “asymptotic optima” as approximate optima for non-limiting cases and justify this interpretation through numerical simulations. When the designer and choosers agree about the activity's value, simple forms of weighted opt-out minimization are asymptotically optimal. Additional results encompass Pigouvian fees, normative ambiguity, and cases in which the designer and choosers disagree about the activity's value.
28254.zh_abstract: 先前关于最优默认选项的研究表明，在限制性条件下，要么最小化退出率，要么最大化退出率是最优的。我们通过研究当问题中的一个参数趋近于极限值时的最优默认选项，获得了解决方案的一般性特征。我们将这些“渐近最优解”解释为非极限情况下的近似最优解，并通过数值模拟验证了这一解释。当设计者和选择者对活动价值看法一致时，简单的加权退出率最小化形式是渐近最优的。其他结果涵盖了庇古税、规范性模糊性以及设计者和选择者对活动价值看法不一致的情况。

28253.title: Passive Investing and the Rise of Mega-Firms
28253.zh_title: 被动投资与大型企业的崛起
28253.authors: Hao Jiang, Dimitri Vayanos, Lu Zheng
28253.abstract: We study how passive investing affects asset prices. Flows into passive funds raise disproportionately the stock prices of the economy’s largest firms, and especially those large firms that the market overvalues. These effects are sufficiently strong to cause the aggregate market to rise even when flows are entirely due to investors switching from active to passive. Our results arise because flows create idiosyncratic volatility for large firms, which discourages investors from correcting the flows’ effects on prices. Consistent with our theory, the largest firms in the S&P500 experience the highest returns and increases in volatility following flows into that index.
28253.zh_abstract: 我们研究了被动投资如何影响资产价格。流入被动基金的资金会不成比例地推高经济中最大型企业的股票价格，尤其是那些被市场高估的大型企业。这些效应足够强，以至于即使资金流入完全是由于投资者从主动型转向被动型，也会导致整体市场上涨。我们的结果产生的原因是，资金流入为大型企业创造了特质波动，这阻碍了投资者纠正资金流入对价格的影响。与我们的理论一致，在资金流入该指数后，标普500指数中最大的企业经历了最高的回报率和波动率上升。

28241.title: Simple and Credible Value-Added Estimation Using Centralized School Assignment
28241.zh_title: 利用集中式学校分配进行简单且可信的增值估计
28241.authors: Joshua Angrist, Peter Hull, Parag A. Pathak, Christopher R. Walters
28241.abstract: Many large urban school districts match students to schools using algorithms that incorporate an element of random assignment. We introduce two simple empirical strategies to harness this randomization for value-added models (VAMs) measuring the causal effects of individual schools. The first estimator controls for the probability of being offered admission to different schools, treating the take-up decision as independent of potential outcomes. Randomness in school assignments is used to test this key conditional independence assumption. The second estimator uses randomness in offers to generate instrumental variables (IVs) for school enrollment. This procedure uses a low-dimensional model of school quality mediators to solve the under-identification challenge arising from the fact that some schools are under-subscribed. Both approaches relax the assumptions of conventional value-added models while obviating the need for elaborate nonlinear estimators. In applications to data from Denver and New York City, we find that models controlling for both assignment risk and lagged achievement yield highly reliable VAM estimates. Estimates from models with fewer controls and older lagged score controls are improved markedly by IV.
28241.zh_abstract: 许多大型城市学区使用包含随机分配元素的算法将学生匹配到学校。我们引入了两种简单的实证策略，以利用这种随机化进行衡量个别学校因果效应的增值模型（VAM）。第一种估计量控制了被不同学校录取的概率，将入学决定视为独立于潜在结果。学校分配中的随机性被用来检验这一关键的条件独立性假设。第二种估计量利用录取通知的随机性为学校入学生成工具变量（IV）。该程序使用一个低维度的学校教育质量中介模型，来解决因某些学校报名不足而产生的识别不足挑战。这两种方法都放宽了传统增值模型的假设，同时避免了使用复杂的非线性估计量。在应用于丹佛和纽约市的数据时，我们发现同时控制分配风险和滞后成绩的模型能产生高度可靠的VAM估计值。对于控制变量较少和使用更早滞后成绩控制的模型，其估计值通过工具变量得到了显著改善。
28241.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C11, C21, C26, C52, I21, I28, J24

28299.title: Market Structure and Extortion: Evidence from 50,000 Extortion Payments
28299.zh_title: 市场结构与敲诈：来自50,000笔敲诈付款的证据
28299.authors: Zach Y. Brown, Eduardo Montero, Carlos Schmidt-Padilla, Maria Micaela Sviatschi
28299.abstract: How does gang competition affect extortion? Using detailed data on individual extortion payments to gangs and sales from a leading wholesale distributor of consumer goods and pharmaceuticals in El Salvador, we document evidence on the determinants of extortion payments and the effects of extortion on firms and consumers. We exploit a 2016 nonaggression pact between gangs to examine how collusion affects extortion in areas where gangs previously competed. While the pact led to a large reduction in competition and violence, we find that it increased the amount paid in extortion by approximately 20%. Much of this increase was passed through to retailers and consumers: retailers experienced an increase in delivery fees, leading to an increase in consumer prices. In particular, we find an increase in prices for pharmaceutical drugs and a corresponding increase in hospital visits for chronic illnesses. The results point to an unintended consequence of policies that reduce competition between criminal organizations.
28299.zh_abstract: 帮派竞争如何影响敲诈？利用来自萨尔瓦多一家领先的消费品和药品批发分销商的个人敲诈付款和销售数据，我们记录了敲诈付款的决定因素以及敲诈对企业和消费者的影响的证据。我们利用2016年帮派间的互不侵犯条约，研究合谋如何影响先前帮派竞争地区的敲诈。虽然该条约导致竞争和暴力大幅减少，但我们发现它使敲诈金额增加了约20%。这一增长大部分转嫁给了零售商和消费者：零售商的配送费增加，导致消费者价格上涨。特别是，我们发现药品价格上涨，相应的慢性病就诊次数增加。结果表明，减少犯罪组织间竞争的政策会产生意想不到的后果。
28299.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, POL；JEL：D74, K42, L10, O17

28298.title: Dynamic Banking and the Value of Deposits
28298.authors: Patrick Bolton, Ye Li, Neng Wang, Jinqiang Yang
28298.abstract: We propose a dynamic theory of banking where the role of deposits is akin to that of productive capital in the classical q-theory of investment. As a cheap source of leverage, deposits typically create value for banks, but the marginal q of deposits can be negative. Deposit accounts commit banks to accept any inflows and outflows, so that banks cannot perfectly control leverage. Such uncertainty destroys value when banks have insufficient equity capital to buffer shocks. Our model lends itself to a re-evaluation of leverage regulations and offers new perspectives on banking in a low interest-rate environment.
28298.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个动态银行理论，其中存款的作用类似于经典q投资理论中的生产性资本。作为一种廉价的杠杆来源，存款通常为银行创造价值，但存款的边际q可能为负。存款账户使银行承诺接受任何流入和流出，因此银行无法完美控制杠杆。当银行没有足够的股权资本来缓冲冲击时，这种不确定性会破坏价值。我们的模型有助于重新评估杠杆监管，并为低利率环境下的银行业提供新视角。

28297.title: History’s Masters: The Effect of European Monarchs on State Performance
28297.zh_title: 历史的主宰者：欧洲君主对国家绩效的影响
28297.abstract: We create a novel reign-level dataset for European monarchs, covering all major European states between the 10th and 18th centuries. We first document a strong positive relationship between rulers’ cognitive ability and state-level outcomes. To address endogeneity issues, we exploit the facts that i) rulers were appointed according to hereditary succession, independent of their ability, and ii) the wide-spread inbreeding among the ruling dynasties of Europe led over centuries to quasi-random variation in ruler ability. We code the degree of blood relationship between the parents of rulers, which also reflects ‘hidden’ layers of inbreeding from previous generations. The ‘coefficient of inbreeding’ is a strong predictor of ruler ability, and the corresponding instrumental variable results imply that ruler ability had a sizeable effect on the performance of states and their borders. This supports the view that ‘leaders made history,’ shaping the European map until its consolidation into nation states. We also show that rulers mattered only where their power was largely unconstrained. In reigns where parliaments checked the power of monarchs, ruler ability no longer affected their state’s performance. Thus, the strengthening of parliaments in Northern European states (where kin marriage of dynasties was particularly wide-spread) may have shielded them from the detrimental effects of inbreeding.
28297.zh_abstract: 我们创建了一个涵盖10至18世纪欧洲主要国家的全新君主统治期数据集。首先，我们记录了统治者认知能力与国家层面结果之间的强正相关关系。为解决内生性问题，我们利用了以下事实：i) 君主根据世袭继承制任命，与其能力无关；ii) 欧洲统治王朝中普遍存在的近亲通婚在几个世纪中导致了统治者能力近乎随机的变化。我们对统治者父母之间的血缘关系程度进行了编码，这也反映了来自前几代人的“隐性”近亲通婚层。‘近亲系数’是统治者能力的强预测因子，相应的工具变量结果表明，统治者能力对国家绩效及其边界产生了显著影响。这支持了‘领袖创造历史’的观点，即他们塑造了欧洲版图，直至其巩固为民族国家。我们还表明，只有在君主权力基本不受约束的情况下，统治者才至关重要。在议会制衡君主权力的统治时期，统治者能力不再影响其国家的绩效。因此，北欧国家（那里王朝的亲属婚姻尤为普遍）议会的加强可能使其免受近亲通婚的有害影响。
28297.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, POL；JEL：D02, D73, N43, P16

28296.title: Political Parties as Drivers of U.S. Polarization: 1927-2018
28296.zh_title: 政党作为美国政治极化的驱动因素：1927-2018年
28296.authors: Nathan J. Canen, Chad Kendall, Francesco Trebbi
28296.abstract: The current polarization of elites in the U.S., particularly in Congress, is frequently ascribed to the emergence of cohorts of ideologically extreme legislators replacing moderate ones. Politicians, however, do not operate as isolated agents, driven solely by their preferences. They act within organized parties, whose leaders exert control over the rank-and-file, directing support for and against policies. This paper shows that the omission of party discipline as a driver of political polarization is consequential for our understanding of this phenomenon. We present a multi-dimensional voting model and identification strategy designed to decouple the ideological preferences of lawmakers from the control exerted by their party leadership. Applying this structural framework to the U.S. Congress between 1927- 2018, we find that the influence of leaders over their rank-and-file has been a growing driver of polarization in voting, particularly since the 1970s. In 2018, party discipline accounts for around 65% of the polarization in roll call voting. Our findings qualify the interpretation of - and in two important cases subvert - a number of empirical claims in the literature that measures polarization with models that lack a formal role for parties.
28296.zh_abstract: 当前美国精英阶层，特别是国会中的政治极化，常被归因于意识形态极端的立法者群体取代温和派。然而，政治家并非作为孤立的个体仅凭自身偏好行事。他们在有组织的政党中运作，政党领袖对普通议员施加控制，引导对政策的支持或反对。本文表明，忽略政党纪律作为政治极化的驱动因素，对我们理解这一现象具有重要影响。我们提出了一个多维投票模型和识别策略，旨在将立法者的意识形态偏好与其政党领导层施加的控制分离开来。将该结构框架应用于1927年至2018年的美国国会，我们发现，领袖对其普通议员的影响力一直是投票极化日益增长的驱动因素，尤其是自1970年代以来。2018年，政党纪律约占唱名投票极化的65%。我们的研究结果对文献中一些经验性主张的解释提出了质疑，并在两个重要案例中推翻了这些主张，这些文献使用缺乏政党正式角色的模型来衡量极化。

28295.title: Family Support in Hard Times: Dynamics of Intergenerational Exchange after Adverse Events
28295.zh_title: 困难时期的家庭支持：不利事件后代际交换的动态变化
28295.abstract: We use an event-study approach to examine changes in intergenerational financial transfers and informal care within families following wealth loss, job exit, widowhood, and health shocks. We find sharp reductions in parental giving to adult children following negative shocks to parents' wealth and earned income, particularly in low-wealth households. Parental giving also decreases with some health shocks and increases following spousal death. Meanwhile, children of low-wealth households increase financial transfers to their parents following adverse shocks and children in both high- and low-wealth households increase their provision of informal care to parents following a wide range of adverse shocks.
28295.zh_abstract: 我们采用事件研究方法，考察了在财富损失、失业、丧偶和健康冲击之后，家庭内部代际经济转移和非正式照料的变化。我们发现，在父母财富和劳动收入遭受负面冲击后，父母对成年子女的给予显著减少，尤其是在低财富家庭中。父母的给予也会因某些健康冲击而减少，并在配偶去世后增加。与此同时，低财富家庭的子女在遭受不利冲击后会增加对父母的经济转移，而高财富和低财富家庭的子女在遭受一系列广泛的不利冲击后，都会增加对父母的非正式照料。
28295.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：D10, D14, D15, D64, I10, J14, J26

28294.title: Wage Risk and Government and Spousal Insurance
28294.zh_title: 工资风险与政府及配偶保险
28294.authors: Mariacristina De Nardi, Giulio Fella, Gonzalo Paz-Pardo
28294.abstract: The extent to which households can self-insure depends on family structure and wage risk. We calibrate a model of couples and singles’ savings and labor supply under two types of wage processes. The first wage process is the canonical—age independent, linear—one that is typically used to evaluate government insurance provision. The second wage process is a flexible one. We use our model to evaluate the optimal mix of the two most common types of means-tested benefits—in-work versus income floor. The canonical wage process underestimates wage persistence for women and thus implies that in-work benefits should account for most benefit income. In contrast, the richer wage process that matches the wage data well, implies that the income floor should be the main benefit source, similarly to the system in place in the UK. This stresses that allowing for rich wage dynamics is important to properly evaluate policy.
28294.zh_abstract: 家庭自我保险的程度取决于家庭结构和工资风险。我们在两种工资过程下校准了一个关于夫妻和单身者储蓄与劳动供给的模型。第一种工资过程是经典的——年龄独立、线性——通常用于评估政府保险供给。第二种工资过程是灵活的。我们利用模型来评估两种最常见的经济状况调查福利——在职福利与收入下限——的最优组合。经典的工资过程低估了女性工资的持续性，因此意味着在职福利应占福利收入的大部分。相比之下，与工资数据匹配良好的更丰富的工资过程则表明，收入下限应是主要的福利来源，类似于英国现行的制度。这强调了考虑丰富的工资动态对于正确评估政策的重要性。
28294.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D1, D12, D14, D15, H11, H2

28293.title: Comparing Conventional and Machine-Learning Approaches to Risk Assessment in Domestic Abuse Cases
28293.zh_title: 家庭暴力案件中传统风险评估方法与机器学习方法的比较
28293.authors: Jeffrey Grogger, Sean Gupta, Ria Ivandic, Tom Kirchmaier
28293.abstract: We compare predictions from a conventional protocol-based approach to risk assessment with those based on a machine-learning approach. We first show that the conventional predictions are less accurate than, and have similar rates of negative prediction error as, a simple Bayes classifier that makes use only of the base failure rate. Machine learning algorithms based on the underlying risk assessment questionnaire do better under the assumption that negative prediction errors are more costly than positive prediction errors. Machine learning models based on two-year criminal histories do even better. Indeed, adding the protocol-based features to the criminal histories adds little to the predictive adequacy of the model. We suggest using the predictions based on criminal histories to prioritize incoming calls for service, and devising a more sensitive instrument to distinguish true from false positives that result from this initial screening.
28293.zh_abstract: 我们比较了基于传统协议的风险评估方法的预测结果与基于机器学习方法的预测结果。我们首先表明，传统预测的准确性低于一个仅利用基础失败率的简单贝叶斯分类器，并且两者具有相似的负预测错误率。在假设负预测错误比正预测错误成本更高的前提下，基于底层风险评估问卷的机器学习算法表现更好。基于两年犯罪历史的机器学习模型表现更佳。事实上，将基于协议的特征添加到犯罪历史中，对模型的预测充分性几乎没有提升。我们建议利用基于犯罪历史的预测来优先处理来电服务请求，并设计一个更灵敏的工具来区分由此初始筛选产生的真阳性和假阳性。

28292.title: Sovereign Debt Standstills
28292.authors: Juan C. Hatchondo, Leonardo Martinez, César Sosa-Padilla
28292.abstract: As a response to the economic difficulties triggered by the COVID-19 pandemic, the G20 implemented the Debt Service Suspension Initiative (DSSI), a standstill or suspension of official bilateral sovereign debt payments for some of the poorest countries. The G20 and others also called on private creditors to offer comparable terms but this did not materialize. We first show that a standard default model can account for the decline in sovereign spreads triggered by the DSSI. The model also accounts for the private creditors’ reluctance to participate in a debt standstill: A private-creditor standstill implies sizable capital losses for debt holders. Furthermore, while sovereign debt standstill proposals emphasize debt payment suspensions without write-offs on the face value of debt obligations, we find that complementing private-creditor standstills with write-offs could reduce debt holders’ losses and simultaneously increase sovereign welfare gains.
28292.zh_abstract: 作为应对COVID-19疫情引发的经济困难的措施，G20实施了暂缓偿债倡议（DSSI），即对一些最贫困国家的官方双边主权债务支付进行暂停或中止。G20及其他方面也呼吁私人债权人提供类似条款，但这并未实现。我们首先表明，一个标准的违约模型可以解释DSSI引发的主权利差下降。该模型也解释了私人债权人不愿参与债务暂停的原因：私人债权人暂停意味着债务持有人面临可观的资本损失。此外，尽管主权债务暂停提案强调在不减记债务面值的情况下暂停偿债，但我们发现，将私人债权人暂停与减记相结合可以减少债务持有人的损失，同时增加主权国家的福利收益。

28291.title: Scarred but Wiser: World War 2’s COVID Legacy
28291.zh_title: 伤痕累累但更明智：第二次世界大战的COVID遗产
28291.authors: Michael Lokshin, Vladimir Kolchin, Martin Ravallion
28291.abstract: The paper formalizes and tests the hypothesis that greater exposure to big shocks induces stronger societal responses for adaptation and protection from future big shocks. We find support for this hypothesis in various strands of the literature and in new empirical tests using cross-country data on deaths due to COVID-19 and deaths during World War 2. Countries with higher death rates in the war saw lower death rates in the first wave of the COVID pandemic, though the effect faded in the pandemic’s second wave. Our tests are robust to a wide range of model specifications and alternative assumptions.
28291.zh_abstract: 本文正式提出并检验了一个假设，即对重大冲击的更大暴露会激发社会更强的反应，以适应和防范未来的重大冲击。我们在文献的多个分支以及使用跨国数据（关于COVID-19死亡人数和第二次世界大战死亡人数）的新实证检验中找到了支持这一假设的证据。在战争中死亡率较高的国家，在COVID大流行第一波中的死亡率较低，尽管这种效应在大流行的第二波中减弱了。我们的检验在广泛的模型设定和替代假设下都是稳健的。

28290.title: Advanced Technologies Adoption and Use by U.S. Firms: Evidence from the Annual Business Survey
28290.zh_title: 美国企业先进技术的采用与使用：来自年度商业调查的证据
28290.authors: Nikolas Zolas, Zachary Kroff, Erik Brynjolfsson, Kristina McElheran, David N. Beede, Cathy Buffington, Nathan Goldschlag, Lucia Foster, Emin Dinlersoz
28290.abstract: We introduce a new survey module intended to complement and expand research on the causes and consequences of advanced technology adoption. The 2018 Annual Business Survey (ABS), conducted by the Census Bureau in partnership with the National Center for Science and Engineering Statistics (NCSES), provides comprehensive and timely information on the diffusion among U.S. firms of advanced technologies including artificial intelligence (AI), cloud computing, robotics, and the digitization of business information. The 2018 ABS is a large, nationally representative sample of over 850,000 firms covering all private, nonfarm sectors of the economy. We describe the motivation for and development of the technology module in the ABS, as well as provide a first look at technology adoption and use patterns across firms and sectors. We find that digitization is quite widespread, as is some use of cloud computing. In contrast, advanced technology adoption is rare and generally skewed towards larger and older firms. Adoption patterns are consistent with a hierarchy of increasing technological sophistication, in which most firms that adopt AI or other advanced business technologies also use the other, more widely diffused technologies. Finally, while few firms are at the technology frontier, they tend to be large so technology exposure of the average worker is significantly higher. This new data will be available to qualified researchers on approved projects in the Federal Statistical Research Data Center network.
28290.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一个新的调查模块，旨在补充和扩展关于先进技术采用原因及后果的研究。2018年年度商业调查（ABS）由人口普查局与国家科学与工程统计中心（NCSES）合作进行，提供了关于美国企业先进技术（包括人工智能、云计算、机器人技术以及商业信息数字化）扩散的全面及时信息。2018年ABS是一个大型、具有全国代表性的样本，涵盖超过85万家企业，覆盖所有私营非农经济部门。我们描述了ABS中技术模块的动机和发展，并首次展示了跨企业和行业的技术采用和使用模式。我们发现，数字化相当普遍，云计算也有一定使用。相比之下，先进技术的采用较为罕见，且通常偏向于规模更大、历史更悠久的企业。采用模式与日益增长的技术复杂性层级一致，其中大多数采用人工智能或其他先进商业技术的企业也使用了其他更广泛传播的技术。最后，尽管处于技术前沿的企业很少，但它们往往规模较大，因此普通工人的技术接触率显著更高。这些新数据将在联邦统计研究数据中心网络内，向经批准项目的合格研究人员开放。
